/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba .opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml | sed -n '1,260p'" in /Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     2	# DEEP RESEARCH: AUTONOMOUS DEEP RESEARCH LOOP (AUTO MODE)
     3	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
     4	# YAML PREDICATE GRAMMAR CONTRACT (S7 / M11):
     5	# - This asset does not currently use typed BooleanExpr predicates under
     6	#   `when:`; flow control is branch-label-driven (`on_resume`, `on_fresh`,
     7	#   `on_restart`, etc.). Retain the existing shape.
     8	# - `after:` carries prose timing / narrative notes if needed; `when:` in
     9	#   this file is reserved for future typed predicates and must NOT carry
    10	#   free-form narrative prose.
    11	# - See `.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/shared/predicates/boolean-expr.ts`
    12	#   for the canonical BooleanExpr grammar.
    13	#
    14	# GATE 3 CLASSIFICATION (T-YML-DPR-01 / paired with T-DOC-03 R50-001):
    15	# - `resume` is a tested WRITE-PATH that produces `iteration-NNN.md` files
    16	#   and JSONL state-log appends. The workflow classifies resume as
    17	#   write-path below (see `gate3_classification` fields) so Gate 3 trigger
    18	#   extraction can surface resume correctly rather than false-negative.
    19	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    20	role: Deep Research Loop Manager
    21	purpose: Iterative deep research with convergence detection
    22	action: Run deep-research loop from initialization through synthesis
    23	operating_mode:
    24	  workflow: iterative_loop
    25	  workflow_compliance: MANDATORY
    26	  workflow_execution: autonomous
    27	  approvals: none
    28	  tracking: progressive_research_state
    29	  validation: convergence_detection
    30	
    31	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    32	# OPERATING PRINCIPLES
    33	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    34	operating_principles:
    35	  core: "Fresh context per iteration + externalized state = no context degradation"
    36	  approach: "Dispatch focused agent, evaluate convergence, repeat or stop"
    37	  mandate: "Never hold findings in memory; write everything to files"
    38	
    39	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    40	# USER INPUTS (from setup phase)
    41	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    42	user_inputs:
    43	  research_topic: "[RESEARCH_TOPIC] - Topic to investigate deeply. REQUIRED."
    44	  spec_folder: "[SPEC_FOLDER] - Spec folder path. REQUIRED."
    45	  max_iterations: "[MAX_ITERATIONS] - Maximum loop iterations. Default: 10."
    46	  convergence_threshold: "[CONVERGENCE_THRESHOLD] - Stop threshold. Default: 0.05."
    47	
    48	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    49	# CONTEXT LOADING
    50	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    51	context_loading:
    52	  trigger: "At workflow START, before phase_init"
    53	  purpose: "Load prior research context for the topic and buffer it until strategy.md exists"
    54	  mcp_integration:
    55	    tool: memory_context
    56	    note: "Call MCP tools directly - NEVER through Code Mode"
    57	    parameters: { input: "{research_topic}", mode: "focused", intent: "understand", includeContent: true }
    58	  when_to_skip: ["User says 'skip context' or 'fresh start'"]
    59	  behavior:
    60	    if_context_found: "Store full results as prior_context plus a concise prior_context_summary; inject after strategy.md is created."
    61	    if_no_context: "Set prior_context and prior_context_summary to 'None' and continue."
    62	
    63	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    64	# SKILL REFERENCE
    65	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    66	skill_reference:
    67	  skill: deep-research
    68	  skill_md: .opencode/skills/deep-research/SKILL.md
    69	  references:
    70	    loop_protocol: .opencode/skills/deep-research/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md
    71	    spec_check_protocol: .opencode/skills/deep-research/references/protocol/spec_check_protocol.md
    72	    state_format: .opencode/skills/deep-research/references/state/state_format.md
    73	    convergence: .opencode/skills/deep-research/references/convergence/convergence.md
    74	  templates:
    75	    config: .opencode/skills/deep-research/assets/deep_research_config.json
    76	    strategy: .opencode/skills/deep-research/assets/deep_research_strategy.md
    77	
    78	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    79	# AGENT CONFIGURATION
    80	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    81	agent_config:
    82	  agent: deep-research
    83	  agent_file: ".opencode/agents/deep-research.md"
    84	  # Canonical path. Runtime-specific directories (e.g. .claude/agents/) reference this source.
    85	  model: opus
    86	  leaf_only: true
    87	  tools: [Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob, WebFetch]
    88	  mcp_servers: [mk-spec-memory]
    89	  tool_call_budget: { target: 8, max: 12 }
    90	
    91	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    92	# STATE FILE PATHS
    93	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    94	state_paths:
    95	  # Template paths document the canonical packet layout. Runtime resolution happens via
    96	  # step_resolve_artifact_root plus the shared resolver, so root specs keep root-local
    97	  # research/ and child phases keep local research/ packet directories.
    98	  packet_dir: "{artifact_dir}"
    99	  config: "{artifact_dir}/deep-research-config.json"
   100	  state_log: "{artifact_dir}/deep-research-state.jsonl"
   101	  strategy: "{artifact_dir}/deep-research-strategy.md"
   102	  registry: "{artifact_dir}/deep-research-findings-registry.json"
   103	  dashboard: "{artifact_dir}/deep-research-dashboard.md"
   104	  pause_sentinel: "{artifact_dir}/.deep-research-pause"
   105	  lock_file: "{artifact_dir}/.deep-research.lock"
   106	  prompt_dir: "{artifact_dir}/prompts"
   107	  iteration_dir: "{artifact_dir}/iterations"
   108	  iteration_pattern: "{artifact_dir}/iterations/iteration-{NNN}.md"
   109	  # Per-iteration structured delta stream (one file per iteration) — complement to the
   110	  # canonical state_log append. The delta file MUST contain at least one record whose
   111	  # `type === "iteration"` so the reducer can rehydrate iteration state after a partial
   112	  # run. Variants like `"iteration_delta"` are silently dropped by the reducer; the
   113	  # post_dispatch_validate step enforces the canonical type below.
   114	  delta_dir: "{artifact_dir}/deltas"
   115	  delta_pattern: "{artifact_dir}/deltas/iter-{NNN}.jsonl"
   116	  research_output: "{artifact_dir}/research.md"
   117	  resource_map_output: "{artifact_dir}/resource-map.md"
   118	  archive_root: "{artifact_archive_root}"
   119	  synthesis_snapshot_pattern: "{artifact_dir}/synthesis-v{generation}.md"
   120	
   121	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   122	# WORKFLOW
   123	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   124	workflow:
   125	
   126	  step_resolve_artifact_root:
   127	    description: "Resolve artifact directory — use fan-out lineage override when provided, else resolve from spec_folder"
   128	    note: "Root specs keep research artifacts directly in {spec_folder}/research/. Child phases and sub-phases keep local packet directories in {spec_folder}/research/{packet}/, and archives stay local at {spec_folder}/research_archive/{packet}/."
   129	    branch_on: "config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir"
   130	    if_present:
   131	      bind:
   132	        artifact_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
   133	        artifact_root_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
   134	        artifact_subfolder: null
   135	        artifact_archive_root: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}/_archive"
   136	    if_absent:
   137	      command: "node -e \"const { resolveArtifactRoot } = require('.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/shared/review-research-paths.cjs'); console.log(JSON.stringify(resolveArtifactRoot('{spec_folder}', 'research')));\""
   138	      outputs:
   139	        - artifact_root_dir: "Resolved local research owner directory"
   140	        - artifact_subfolder: "Local packet subfolder ({ownerSlug}-pt-{NN}), else null"
   141	        - artifact_dir: "Resolved research packet directory for this target"
   142	        - artifact_archive_root: "Resolved local research archive directory for this target"
   143	
   144	  step_fanout_spawn:
   145	    description: "Spawn fan-out lineages; skip and proceed to phase_init normally when single-executor"
   146	    skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
   147	    instructions: |
   148	      Fan-out mode is active. Spawn all lineages. Each lineage runs the full loop in its own
   149	      isolated sub-packet under {artifact_dir}/lineages/{label}/.
   150	      After all lineages complete, jump directly to phase_synthesis — skip phase_init and
   151	      phase_main_loop entirely (those are the single-executor path). The merge step in
   152	      phase_synthesis will consolidate results across all lineages.
   153	    sub_steps:
   154	      step_fanout_spawn_cli:
   155	        description: "Spawn all CLI lineages in capped worker pool"
   156	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind != 'native'"
   157	        command: |
   158	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-run.cjs \
   159	            --spec-folder {spec_folder} \
   160	            --loop-type research \
   161	            --fanout-config-json '{config.fanout_json}' \
   162	            --base-artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
   163	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   164	        wait_for_completion: true
   165	      step_fanout_spawn_native:
   166	        description: "Dispatch each native lineage as a sequential deep-research sub-agent"
   167	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind == 'native'"
   168	        for_each: "lineage in expanded native entries of config.fanout"
   169	        dispatch:
   170	          agent: deep-research
   171	          model: opus
   172	          context: |
   173	            Execute the deep-research loop with these parameters:
   174	              spec_folder: {spec_folder}
   175	              config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir: {artifact_dir}/lineages/{lineage.label}
   176	              session_id: fanout-{lineage.label}-{fanout_run_id}
   177	              executor: native
   178	            Run to convergence. Write all outputs to the override directory.
   179	        wait_for_completion: true
   180	
   181	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   182	  # PHASE 1: INITIALIZATION
   183	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   184	  phase_init:
   185	    purpose: Create all state files for the research session
   186	    steps:
   187	
   188	      step_preflight_contract:
   189	        action: "Validate required setup bindings and executable workflow contract before any file writes"
   190	        verify:
   191	          - required_values_present: [research_topic, spec_folder, max_iterations, convergence_threshold]
   192	          - spec_folder_is_within: "specs/ or .opencode/specs/ (canonicalize alias roots before validation)"
   193	          - unresolved_placeholders: "FAIL if any user-facing template references placeholders not produced by earlier steps"
   194	          - tool_contract: "FAIL if executable steps reference tools outside the command allowlist"
   195	        on_fail: "Halt with STATUS=FAIL and report the missing binding or unsupported contract reference"
   196	
   197	      step_create_directories:
   198	        action: "Create spec folder and research packet directories if they don't exist"
   199	        command: "mkdir -p {state_paths.prompt_dir} {state_paths.iteration_dir} {state_paths.delta_dir}"
   200	
   201	      step_detect_resource_map:
   202	        action: "Detect resource-map.md before config creation so init can persist the flag and seed Known Context"
   203	        inspect:
   204	          - "{spec_folder}/resource-map.md"
   205	        classify:
   206	          present: "resource-map.md exists at init"
   207	          absent: "resource-map.md does not exist at init"
   208	        outputs:
   209	          - resource_map_present: "Boolean true when {spec_folder}/resource-map.md exists, else false"
   210	          - resource_map_known_context: "When present: summarize the map by section with entry counts across READMEs, Documents, Commands, Agents, Skills, Specs, Scripts, Tests, Config, and Meta, plus a one-line theme summary for each section. When absent: 'resource-map.md not present; skipping coverage gate'."
   211	
   212	      step_resolve_canonical_names:
   213	        action: "Resolve canonical research packet artifact names before classification"
   214	        inspect_legacy:
   215	          - "{state_paths.packet_dir}/config.json"
   216	          - "{state_paths.packet_dir}/state.jsonl"
   217	          - "{state_paths.packet_dir}/strategy.md"
   218	          - "{state_paths.packet_dir}/dashboard.md"
   219	          - "{state_paths.packet_dir}/.pause"
   220	        migration_policy: "dual-read / single-write for 4 weeks"
   221	        on_legacy_read:
   222	          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"migration","legacyPath":"{legacy_path}","canonicalPath":"{canonical_path}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   223	
   224	      step_acquire_lock:
   225	        action: "Acquire the advisory lock defined by the spec_check_protocol before session classification"
   226	        command: "Open {state_paths.lock_file} with exclusive non-blocking advisory locking semantics; fail closed on contention."
   227	        note: "macOS/BSD locking here is advisory. Stale-lock override is confirm-only or explicit recovery-only."
   228	        # <!-- F-010-B5-01 -->
   229	        # Lock-cleanup contract: the lock file MUST be released on every terminal exit path that follows acquisition.
   230	        # Runtimes honoring step_acquire_lock are required to perform this cleanup before halting or pausing.
   231	        on_halt:
   232	          action: "Release {state_paths.lock_file} before any terminal halt branch returns control"
   233	          applies_to: ["step_classify_session.on_invalid_state", "step_classify_session.on_completed_session", "step_preinit_spec_branch.conflict-detected"]
   234	          command: "Remove or close-with-release {state_paths.lock_file}; failures here are logged but do not block the halt"
   235	        on_cancel:
   236	          action: "Release {state_paths.lock_file} on user cancel or pause-sentinel detection before sentinel processing"
   237	          command: "Remove or close-with-release {state_paths.lock_file}; cancel completes regardless of cleanup result"
   238	        on_workflow_exit:
   239	          action: "Release {state_paths.lock_file} as the final step of any workflow exit path (success or failure)"
   240	          command: "Remove or close-with-release {state_paths.lock_file}; idempotent — safe to invoke when already released"
   241	
   242	      step_classify_session:
   243	        action: "Classify the session before writing files"
   244	        inspect:
   245	          - "{state_paths.config}"
   246	          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
   247	          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
   248	        classify:
   249	          fresh: "None of the three state artifacts exist"
   250	          resume: "Config, JSONL, and strategy all exist and agree on topic/spec folder"
   251	          completed-session: "Resume artifacts exist and config.status == 'complete'"
   252	          invalid-state: "Any partial, missing, or contradictory combination"
   253	        outputs:
   254	          - session_state: "fresh | resume | completed-session | invalid-state"
   255	        on_resume:
   256	          # T-YML-DPR-01 / R50-001: Resume is a WRITE-PATH. Produces `iteration-NNN.md` + JSONL appends.
   257	          # Paired with T-DOC-03 Gate 3 trigger addition (resume, save context, save memory, /memory:save).
   258	          gate3_classification: write-path
   259	          gate3_rationale: "resume produces iteration-NNN.md writes and JSONL state-log appends"
   260	          log: "Auto-resume: state artifacts are complete and consistent. Continue the same lineage (sessionId unchanged, generation unchanged, no archive)."

   149	      step_fanout_spawn_native:

   153	        dispatch:

   165	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   166	  # PHASE 1: INITIALIZATION
   167	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   168	  phase_init:
   169	    purpose: Create all state files for the research session
   170	    steps:
   300	        inspect:
   301	          - "{spec_folder}/spec.md"
   302	          - "{state_paths.lock_file}"
   303	        classify:
   304	          no-spec: "spec.md is absent before any pre-init mutation"
   305	          spec-present: "spec.md exists and approved host anchors are available for bounded mutation"
   306	          spec-just-created-by-this-run: "spec.md already carries this run's DR seed markers and should not be reseeded"
   307	          conflict-detected: "missing host anchor, duplicate markers, or generated-block ambiguity makes mutation unsafe"
   308	        outputs:
   309	          - folder_state: "no-spec | spec-present | spec-just-created-by-this-run | conflict-detected"
   310	          - normalized_topic: "Trim, lowercase, and collapse whitespace in research_topic before dedupe checks"
   311	        append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"spec_check_result","folder_state":"{folder_state}","normalized_topic":"{normalized_topic}","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","lockPath":"{state_paths.lock_file}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   312	
   313	      gate_preinit_spec_mutation_approval:
   314	        type: approval_gate
   315	        purpose: "Approve the planned pre-init spec.md mutation before LOOP starts"
   316	        present: |
   317	          ## Pre-Init Spec Check
   318	
   319	          **Folder State**: {folder_state}
   320	          **Spec Path**: {spec_folder}/spec.md
   321	          **Normalized Topic**: {normalized_topic}
   322	          **Lock File**: {state_paths.lock_file}
   323	
   324	          Planned branch:
   325	          - `no-spec` -> seed Level 1 `spec.md` with `<!-- DR-SEED:REQUIREMENTS -->` and `<!-- DR-SEED:SCOPE -->`
   326	          - `spec-present` -> append bounded context in `Open Questions` and `Research Context`
   327	          - `spec-just-created-by-this-run` -> verify markers and continue without duplicate mutation
   328	          - `conflict-detected` -> halt fail-closed
   329	
   330	          Options:
   331	          A) Approve pre-init branch
   332	          B) Revise the planned branch
   333	          C) Cancel
   334	        wait_for: "User response"
   335	        on_A: { proceed_to: step_preinit_spec_branch }
   336	        on_B: { action: "Adjust the planned pre-init mutation inputs", return_to: gate_preinit_spec_mutation_approval }
   337	        on_C: { action: "Cancel workflow after releasing the advisory lock during cleanup", status: "CANCELLED" }
   338	
   339	      step_preinit_spec_branch:
   340	        action: "Run the bounded pre-init spec branch required by spec_check_protocol"
   341	        protocol_reference: ".opencode/skills/deep-research/references/protocol/spec_check_protocol.md"
   342	        branches:
   343	          no-spec:
   344	            create: "{spec_folder}/spec.md"
   345	            seed_markers:
   346	              - "<!-- DR-SEED:REQUIREMENTS -->"
   347	              - "<!-- DR-SEED:SCOPE -->"
   348	            requirements_host: "Seed Requirements from the research ask without broadening scope"
   349	            scope_host: "Seed Scope from the research ask without inventing implementation details"
   350	            set:
   351	              folder_state: "spec-just-created-by-this-run"
   352	            append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_seed_created","folder_state":"spec-just-created-by-this-run","anchors_touched":["Requirements","Scope"],"diff_summary":"Seeded Level 1 spec.md from research topic with DR seed markers.","seed_markers":["DR-SEED:REQUIREMENTS","DR-SEED:SCOPE"],"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   353	          spec-present:
   354	            edit: "{spec_folder}/spec.md"
   355	            idempotency_check:
   356	              host_anchor: "Open Questions"
   357	              normalized_match: "Normalize the existing anchor text by lowercasing, stripping punctuation, collapsing whitespace, and trimming before comparing with {normalized_topic}."
   358	              if_match:
   359	                skip_append: true
   360	                append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_preinit_context_deduped","folder_state":"spec-present","anchors_touched":["Open Questions"],"diff_summary":"Skipped duplicate pre-init topic append because normalized topic already exists in Open Questions.","normalized_topic":"{normalized_topic}","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   361	              if_no_match:
   362	                append_only:
   363	                  - host_anchor: "Open Questions"
   364	                    content: "Add the normalized research topic only if it is not already present."
   365	                  - host_anchor: "Research Context"
   366	                    content: "Add a bounded note that deep-research is active for this topic and that research/research.md remains canonical."
   367	                append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_preinit_context_added","folder_state":"spec-present","anchors_touched":["Open Questions","Research Context"],"diff_summary":"Appended bounded pre-init research context for the normalized topic.","normalized_topic":"{normalized_topic}","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   368	          spec-just-created-by-this-run:
   369	            verify_markers:
   370	              - "<!-- DR-SEED:REQUIREMENTS -->"
   371	              - "<!-- DR-SEED:SCOPE -->"
   372	            note: "Treat already-seeded spec.md as a no-op guard and continue."
   373	          conflict-detected:
   374	            append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_mutation_conflict","folder_state":"conflict-detected","reason":"Pre-init spec.md mutation is ambiguous or unsafe.","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   375	            halt: true
   376	
   377	      # ─── APPROVAL GATE: Post-Init ───
   378	      gate_init_approval:
   379	        type: approval_gate
   380	        purpose: "Show initialization results and get approval to start loop"
   381	        present: |
   382	          ## Initialization Complete
   383	
   384	          **Topic**: {research_topic}
   385	          **Max Iterations**: {max_iterations}
   386	          **Convergence Threshold**: {convergence_threshold}
   387	          **Known Context Summary**: {prior_context_summary}
   388	          **Folder State**: {folder_state}
   389	
   390	          Review `{state_paths.strategy}` for the initial key questions and next focus.
   391	          Review `{spec_folder}/spec.md` for the approved pre-init branch and any DR seed markers or context notes.
   392	          Reducer-owned state will live in `{state_paths.registry}` and `{state_paths.dashboard}`.
   393	          **State files located in**: {state_paths.packet_dir}/
   394	
   395	          Options:
   396	          A) Start research loop
   397	          B) Adjust questions or parameters
   398	          C) Cancel
   399	        wait_for: "User response"
   400	        on_A: { set: { current_iteration: 1, current_segment: 1, stuck_count: 0 }, proceed_to: phase_loop }
   401	        on_B: { action: "Apply user adjustments to strategy.md and/or config", return_to: gate_init_approval }
   402	        on_C: { action: "Cancel workflow", status: "CANCELLED" }
   403	
   404	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   405	  # PHASE 2: ITERATION LOOP
   406	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   407	  phase_loop:
   408	    purpose: Dispatch agent iterations with approval at each step
   409	    repeat: true
   410	    max_repeats: "{max_iterations}"
   411	    steps:
   412	
   413	      step_read_state:
   414	        action: "Read current state from JSONL and strategy"
   415	        read:
   416	          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
   417	          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
   418	        extract:
   419	          - iteration_count: "Count lines where type === 'iteration'"
   420	          - current_iteration: "iteration_count + 1"
   421	          - current_segment: "Latest segment_start event segment, else 1"
   422	          - last_newInfoRatio: "Extract newInfoRatio from last iteration record"
   423	          - last_focus: "Extract focus from latest iteration record, else 'none yet'"
   424	          - ratio_prev: "Extract newInfoRatio from second-latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
   425	          - ratio_latest: "Extract newInfoRatio from latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
   426	          - next_focus: "Extract 'Next Focus' section from strategy.md"
   427	          - remaining_questions: "Count unchecked items in 'Key Questions'"
   428	          - remaining_questions_list: "List unchecked key questions from strategy.md"
   429	          - answered_count: "Count answered questions from strategy.md"
   430	          - total_questions: "Count total questions tracked in strategy.md"
   560	          **Focus**: {next_focus}
   561	          **Remaining Questions**: {remaining_questions}
   562	          **Last newInfoRatio**: {last_newInfoRatio}
   563	          **Stuck Count**: {stuck_count}
   564	
   565	          Options:
   566	          A) Proceed with this focus
   567	          B) Change focus to: [user provides new focus]
   568	          C) Stop loop and synthesize now
   569	          D) Cancel entirely
   570	        wait_for: "User response"
   571	        on_A: { proceed_to: step_dispatch_iteration }
   572	        on_B: { action: "Update next_focus to user's choice", proceed_to: step_dispatch_iteration }
   573	        on_C: { proceed_to: gate_pre_synthesis }
   574	        on_D: { action: "Cancel workflow", status: "CANCELLED" }
   575	
   576	      step_dispatch_iteration:
   577	        action: "Dispatch one iteration via the selected executor"
   578	        resolve_executor:
   579	          source: "config.executor"
   580	          loader: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts#parseExecutorConfig"
   581	        pre_dispatch:
   582	          generate_summary: |
   583	            STATE SUMMARY (auto-generated):
   584	            Segment: {current_segment} | Iteration: {current_iteration} of {max_iterations}
   585	            Questions: {answered_count}/{total_questions} answered | Last focus: {last_focus}
   586	            Last 2 ratios: {ratio_prev} -> {ratio_latest} | Stuck count: {stuck_count}
   587	            Next focus: {next_focus}
   588	          render_prompt_pack:
   589	            template_path: ".opencode/skills/deep-research/assets/prompt_pack_iteration.md.tmpl"
   590	            renderer: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/prompt-pack.ts#renderPromptPack"
   591	            output_path: "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md"
   592	            variables:
   593	              state_summary: "{state_summary}"
   594	              research_topic: "{research_topic}"
   595	              current_iteration: "{current_iteration}"
   596	              max_iterations: "{max_iterations}"
   597	              next_focus: "{next_focus}"
   598	              remaining_questions_list: "{remaining_questions_list}"
   599	              last_3_summaries: "{last_3_summaries}"
   600	              state_paths_config: "{state_paths.config}"
   601	              state_paths_state_log: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   602	              state_paths_strategy: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   603	              state_paths_registry: "{state_paths.registry}"
   604	              state_paths_iteration_pattern: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   605	              state_paths_delta_pattern: "{state_paths.delta_pattern}"
   606	        pre_dispatch_audit:
   607	          skip_when: "config.executor.type == 'native'"
   608	          call: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts#writeFirstRecordExecutor"
   609	          args:
   610	            stateLogPath: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   611	            executor: "{config.executor}"
   612	            iteration: "{current_iteration}"
   613	        branch_on: "config.executor.type"
   614	        if_native:
   615	          dispatch:
   616	            agent: deep-research
   617	            model: opus
   618	            context_source: "rendered_prompt_pack"
   619	          wait_for_completion: true
   620	        if_cli_codex:
   621	          command: |
   622	            codex exec \
   623	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   624	              -c model_reasoning_effort="{config.executor.reasoningEffort}" \
   625	              -c service_tier="{config.executor.serviceTier}" \
   626	              -c approval_policy=never \
   627	              --sandbox workspace-write \
   628	              - < "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md"
   629	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   630	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   631	          wait_for_completion: true
   632	        if_cli_copilot:
   633	          command: |
   634	            PROMPT_PATH='{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md'
   635	            PROMPT_SIZE=$(wc -c < "$PROMPT_PATH" | tr -d ' ')
   636	            if [ "$PROMPT_SIZE" -le 16384 ]; then
   637	              copilot \
   638	                -p "$(cat "$PROMPT_PATH")" \
   639	                --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   640	                --allow-all-tools \
   641	                --no-ask-user
   642	            else
   643	              copilot \
   644	                -p "Read the instructions in @$PROMPT_PATH and follow them exactly. Do not deviate." \
   645	                --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   646	                --allow-all-tools \
   647	                --no-ask-user
   648	            fi
   649	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   650	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   651	          wait_for_completion: true
   652	          notes:
   653	            - "copilot has no stdin support; prompt is positional"
   654	            - "Size check uses 16KB threshold; above that uses @PROMPT_PATH wrapper prompt"
   655	            - "Large-prompt path relies on copilot honoring @path references within its prompt string"
   656	        if_cli_gemini:
   657	          command: |
   658	            gemini \
   659	              "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   660	              -m "{config.executor.model}" \
   661	              -s none \
   662	              -y \
   663	              -o text
   664	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   665	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   666	          wait_for_completion: true
   667	          notes:
   668	            - "gemini accepts positional prompt or stdin; we use positional via command substitution"
   669	            - "gemini has no reasoningEffort or serviceTier flags; model is the only lever"
   670	            - "gemini model whitelist enforced at config parse (currently only gemini-3.1-pro-preview)"
   671	        if_cli_claude_code:
   672	          command: |
   673	            claude \
   674	              -p "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   675	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   676	              --permission-mode acceptEdits \
   677	              --output-format text \
   678	              {optional_effort_flag}
   679	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   680	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   681	          wait_for_completion: true
   682	          render_hint:
   683	            optional_effort_flag: |
   684	              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --effort {config.executor.reasoningEffort}
   685	              Otherwise expand to empty string.
   686	          notes:
   687	            - "claude-code default permission-mode is 'plan' (read-only); we override to 'acceptEdits' for iteration writes"
   688	            - "claude-code has no serviceTier flag"
   689	            - "claude-code supports --effort for reasoning depth"
   690	        if_cli_opencode:
   691	          command: |
   692	            opencode run \
   693	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   694	              --agent general \
   695	              --format json \
   696	              --dangerously-skip-permissions \
   697	              --pure \
   698	              --dir "{repo_root}" \
   699	              {optional_variant_flag} \
   700	              "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   701	              </dev/null
   702	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   703	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   704	          wait_for_completion: true
   705	          render_hint:
   706	            optional_variant_flag: |
   707	              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --variant {config.executor.reasoningEffort}
   708	              Otherwise expand to empty string.
   709	          notes:
   710	            - "opencode run takes a positional message; prompt is fed via command substitution"
   711	            - "--variant maps reasoningEffort to opencode's provider-specific reasoning lever (e.g., high, medium, minimal)"
   712	            - "--dangerously-skip-permissions enables hands-off automation; sandboxMode='read-only' is not currently honored (no opencode equivalent)"
   713	            - "cli-opencode self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-OpenCode dispatch surface (Claude/Codex/Gemini/raw shell). The cli-opencode skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate"
   714	            - "</dev/null required: opencode v1.14.39 reads stdin at startup before session creation. Without explicit closed stdin, automation that redirects stdout/stderr hangs at 0% CPU after `+60s snapshot prune cleanup`. See cli-opencode SKILL.md §4 ALWAYS rule + memory feedback_opencode_run_requires_dev_null_stdin.md."
   715	        post_dispatch_validate:
   716	          validator: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/post-dispatch-validate.ts#validateIterationOutputs"
   717	          assert_exists: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   718	          assert_appended: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   719	          assert_jsonl_fields: [type, iteration, newInfoRatio, status, focus]
   720	          assert_canonical_type: "iteration"
   721	          assert_delta_file_exists: "{state_paths.delta_pattern}"
   722	          assert_delta_file_has_iteration_record: true
   723	          on_failure:
   724	            action: "emit schema_mismatch canonical conflict event"
   725	            escalation: "After 3 consecutive failures, trigger stuck_recovery event with diagnostic context"
   726	        record_executor_audit:
   727	          skip_when: "config.executor.type == 'native'"
   728	          target: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   729	          field: "executor"
   730	          value:
   731	            type: "{config.executor.type}"
   732	            model: "{config.executor.model}"
   733	            reasoningEffort: "{config.executor.reasoningEffort}"
   734	            serviceTier: "{config.executor.serviceTier}"
   735	
   736	      step_reduce_state:
   737	        action: "Run the reducer to synchronize registry, dashboard, and strategy"
   738	        command: "node .opencode/skills/deep-research/scripts/reduce-state.cjs {spec_folder}"
   739	        inputs:
   740	          latestJSONLDelta: "Latest JSONL records written since the previous iteration"
   741	          newIterationFile: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   742	          priorReducedState: "{state_paths.registry}"
   743	        outputs:
   744	          - "{state_paths.registry}"
   745	          - "{state_paths.dashboard}"
   746	          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
   747	        failure_modes:
   748	          malformed_delta: "skip + warn"
   749	          missing_iteration_file: "no-op + error"
   750	          schema_mismatch: "reject + conflict event"
   835	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   836	  # PHASE 3: SYNTHESIS
   837	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   838	  phase_synthesis:
   839	    purpose: Compile all iteration findings into final research/research.md
   840	    steps:
   841	
   842	      step_fanout_merge:
   843	        description: "Merge N lineage registries into one consolidated registry; skip when single-executor"
   844	        skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
   845	        command: |
   846	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-merge.cjs \
   847	            --loop-type research \
   848	            --artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
   849	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   850	        wait_for_completion: true
   851	
   852	      step_hydrate_summary_metrics:
   853	        action: "Hydrate summary metrics before synthesis"
   854	        read:
   855	          - "{state_paths.config}"

exec
/bin/zsh -lc "nl -ba .opencode/commands/deep/assets/deep_start-research-loop_auto.yaml | sed -n '300,430p;560,850p;940,980p'" in /Users/michelkerkmeester/MEGA/Development/Code_Environment/Public
 succeeded in 0ms:
   300	          status: "initialized"
   301	          executionMode: "auto"
   302	          lineage.sessionId: "{AUTO_SESSION_ID}"
   303	          lineage.parentSessionId: null
   304	          lineage.lineageMode: "new"
   305	          lineage.generation: 1
   306	          lineage.continuedFromRun: null
   307	        output: "{state_paths.config}"
   308	
   309	      step_create_state_log:
   310	        action: "Initialize JSONL state log with config record"
   311	        # <!-- F-010-B5-04 -->
   312	        # Same parsed --no-resource-map flag honored here so config and state_log agree from line 1.
   313	        content: '{"type":"config","topic":"{research_topic}","maxIterations":{max_iterations},"convergenceThreshold":{convergence_threshold},"resource_map_present":{resource_map_present},"resource_map":{"emit":{resource_map_emit}},"createdAt":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","specFolder":"{spec_folder}"}'
   314	        output: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   315	
   316	      step_create_strategy:
   317	        action: "Create strategy file from template with initial questions"
   318	        template: .opencode/skills/deep-research/assets/deep_research_strategy.md
   319	        populate:
   320	          topic: "{research_topic}"
   321	          key_questions: "Derive 3-5 key questions from the research topic"
   322	          known_context: "None"
   323	          known_context_summary: "None"
   324	          max_iterations: "{max_iterations}"
   325	          convergence_threshold: "{convergence_threshold}"
   326	        output: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   327	
   328	      step_create_registry:
   329	        action: "Initialize reducer-owned findings registry"
   330	        content: '{"openQuestions":[],"resolvedQuestions":[],"keyFindings":[],"ruledOutDirections":[],"metrics":{"iterationsCompleted":0,"openQuestions":0,"resolvedQuestions":0,"keyFindings":0,"convergenceScore":0,"coverageBySources":{}}}'
   331	        output: "{state_paths.registry}"
   332	
   333	      step_enrich_strategy_context:
   334	        action: "Ensure Known Context is written only after strategy.md exists"
   335	        condition: "prior_context_found"
   336	        edit: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   337	        note: "Append or replace the Known Context section with prior_context_summary and retained detail from prior_context"
   338	
   339	      step_enrich_strategy_resource_map:
   340	        action: "Inject resource-map status into Known Context after strategy.md exists"
   341	        edit: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   342	        note: "When resource_map_present is true, append the resource_map_known_context snapshot. When false, append 'resource-map.md not present; skipping coverage gate'."
   343	
   344	      step_detect_spec_present:
   345	        action: "Classify late-INIT spec.md state after the durable research packet exists"
   346	        inspect:
   347	          - "{spec_folder}/spec.md"
   348	          - "{state_paths.lock_file}"
   349	        classify:
   350	          no-spec: "spec.md is absent before any pre-init mutation"
   351	          spec-present: "spec.md exists and approved host anchors are available for bounded mutation"
   352	          spec-just-created-by-this-run: "spec.md already carries this run's DR seed markers and should not be reseeded"
   353	          conflict-detected: "missing host anchor, duplicate markers, or generated-block ambiguity makes mutation unsafe"
   354	        outputs:
   355	          - folder_state: "no-spec | spec-present | spec-just-created-by-this-run | conflict-detected"
   356	          - normalized_topic: "Trim, lowercase, and collapse whitespace in research_topic before dedupe checks"
   357	        append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"spec_check_result","folder_state":"{folder_state}","normalized_topic":"{normalized_topic}","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","lockPath":"{state_paths.lock_file}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   358	
   359	      step_preinit_spec_branch:
   360	        action: "Run the bounded pre-init spec branch required by spec_check_protocol"
   361	        protocol_reference: ".opencode/skills/deep-research/references/protocol/spec_check_protocol.md"
   362	        branches:
   363	          no-spec:
   364	            create: "{spec_folder}/spec.md"
   365	            seed_markers:
   366	              - "<!-- DR-SEED:REQUIREMENTS -->"
   367	              - "<!-- DR-SEED:SCOPE -->"
   368	            requirements_host: "Seed Requirements from the research ask without broadening scope"
   369	            scope_host: "Seed Scope from the research ask without inventing implementation details"
   370	            set:
   371	              folder_state: "spec-just-created-by-this-run"
   372	              validate_spec_doc: true
   373	            append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_seed_created","folder_state":"spec-just-created-by-this-run","anchors_touched":["Requirements","Scope"],"diff_summary":"Seeded Level 1 spec.md from research topic with DR seed markers.","seed_markers":["DR-SEED:REQUIREMENTS","DR-SEED:SCOPE"],"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   374	          spec-present:
   375	            edit: "{spec_folder}/spec.md"
   376	            set:
   377	              validate_spec_doc: true
   378	            idempotency_check:
   379	              host_anchor: "Open Questions"
   380	              normalized_match: "Normalize the existing anchor text by lowercasing, stripping punctuation, collapsing whitespace, and trimming before comparing with {normalized_topic}."
   381	              if_match:
   382	                skip_append: true
   383	                append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_preinit_context_deduped","folder_state":"spec-present","anchors_touched":["Open Questions"],"diff_summary":"Skipped duplicate pre-init topic append because normalized topic already exists in Open Questions.","normalized_topic":"{normalized_topic}","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   384	              if_no_match:
   385	                append_only:
   386	                  - host_anchor: "Open Questions"
   387	                    content: "Add the normalized research topic only if it is not already present."
   388	                  - host_anchor: "Research Context"
   389	                    content: "Add a bounded note that deep-research is active for this topic and that research/research.md remains canonical."
   390	                append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_preinit_context_added","folder_state":"spec-present","anchors_touched":["Open Questions","Research Context"],"diff_summary":"Appended bounded pre-init research context for the normalized topic.","normalized_topic":"{normalized_topic}","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   391	          spec-just-created-by-this-run:
   392	            verify_markers:
   393	              - "<!-- DR-SEED:REQUIREMENTS -->"
   394	              - "<!-- DR-SEED:SCOPE -->"
   395	            set:
   396	              validate_spec_doc: false
   397	            note: "Treat already-seeded spec.md as a no-op guard and continue."
   398	          conflict-detected:
   399	            append_to_jsonl: '{"type":"spec_mutation","event":"spec_mutation_conflict","folder_state":"conflict-detected","reason":"Pre-init spec.md mutation is ambiguous or unsafe.","specPath":"{spec_folder}/spec.md","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   400	            halt: true
   401	
   402	      step_validate_preinit_spec_doc:
   403	        action: "Run targeted strict validation after any deep-research pre-init spec.md mutation"
   404	        condition: "validate_spec_doc"
   405	        command: "SPECKIT_RULES=FRONTMATTER_VALID,LEVEL_DECLARED,TEMPLATE_SOURCE,TEMPLATE_HEADERS,PLACEHOLDER_FILLED,SECTIONS_PRESENT,ANCHORS_VALID,SPEC_DOC_INTEGRITY,TOC_POLICY bash .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/scripts/spec/validate.sh {spec_folder} --strict"
   406	        note: "This enforces the authored-spec markdown structural contract without applying full-packet required-file or completeness checks to workflow-owned research artifacts. It uses the Node validation orchestrator, whose strict path was measured at about 108ms for a fresh Level 3 packet on the local harness."
   407	
   408	      step_init_complete:
   409	        log: "Initialization complete. Config, state, and strategy files created."
   410	        set: { current_iteration: 1, current_segment: 1, stuck_count: 0 }
   411	
   412	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   413	  # PHASE 2: ITERATION LOOP
   414	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   415	  phase_loop:
   416	    purpose: Dispatch agent iterations until convergence
   417	    repeat: true
   418	    max_repeats: "{max_iterations}"
   419	    steps:
   420	
   421	      step_read_state:
   422	        action: "Read current state from JSONL and strategy"
   423	        read:
   424	          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
   425	          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
   426	          - "{state_paths.config}"
   427	        extract:
   428	          - iteration_count: "Count lines where type === 'iteration'"
   429	          - current_iteration: "iteration_count + 1"
   430	          - current_segment: "Latest segment_start event segment, else 1"
   560	        rule_stuck_recovery:
   561	          raw_event_forbidden: '{"type":"event","event":"stuck_recovery"}'
   562	          canonical_event: '{"type":"event","event":"stuckRecovery","mode":"research","run":{current_iteration},"stopReason":"stuckRecovery","fromIteration":{current_iteration},"outcome":"recovered","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{config.lineage.sessionId}","generation":{config.lineage.generation}}'
   563	
   564	      step_marker_scan:
   565	        action: "H-2 loop-prevention guard: scan previous iteration's rendered prompt for nested research marker"
   566	        algorithm: |
   567	          if current_iteration > 1:
   568	            PREV_PROMPT_PATH = "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{previous_iteration}.md"
   569	            if file_exists(PREV_PROMPT_PATH):
   570	              PREV_PROMPT_FIRST_LINE = head -1 of PREV_PROMPT_PATH
   571	              if PREV_PROMPT_FIRST_LINE matches ^(DEEP-REVIEW|DEEP-RESEARCH|CODE-REVIEW)$:
   572	                log "ERROR: nested research-of-review loop detected (marker found in previous iteration prompt). Aborting."
   573	                halt with exit code 2
   574	        note: |
   575	          False-positive prevention: only matches when the first line is exactly one of the
   576	          three canonical markers. Markers appearing in comments or body text are ignored.
   577	          True-positive triggers only when a previous iteration's rendered prompt literally
   578	          starts with a deep-loop marker, indicating a nested research-of-review dispatch.
   579	
   580	      step_dispatch_iteration:
   581	        action: "Dispatch one iteration via the selected executor"
   582	        resolve_executor:
   583	          source: "config.executor"
   584	          loader: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts#parseExecutorConfig"
   585	        pre_dispatch:
   586	          generate_summary: |
   587	            STATE SUMMARY (auto-generated):
   588	            Segment: {current_segment} | Iteration: {current_iteration} of {max_iterations}
   589	            Questions: {answered_count}/{total_questions} answered | Last focus: {last_focus}
   590	            Last 2 ratios: {ratio_prev} -> {ratio_latest} | Stuck count: {stuck_count}
   591	            {resource_map_prompt_line}
   592	            Next focus: {next_focus}
   593	          render_prompt_pack:
   594	            template_path: ".opencode/skills/deep-research/assets/prompt_pack_iteration.md.tmpl"
   595	            renderer: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/prompt-pack.ts#renderPromptPack"
   596	            output_path: "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md"
   597	            variables:
   598	              state_summary: "{state_summary}"
   599	              research_topic: "{research_topic}"
   600	              current_iteration: "{current_iteration}"
   601	              max_iterations: "{max_iterations}"
   602	              next_focus: "{next_focus}"
   603	              remaining_questions_list: "{remaining_questions_list}"
   604	              last_3_summaries: "{last_3_summaries}"
   605	              state_paths_config: "{state_paths.config}"
   606	              state_paths_state_log: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   607	              state_paths_strategy: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   608	              state_paths_registry: "{state_paths.registry}"
   609	              state_paths_iteration_pattern: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   610	              state_paths_delta_pattern: "{state_paths.delta_pattern}"
   611	        pre_dispatch_audit:
   612	          skip_when: "config.executor.type == 'native'"
   613	          call: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts#writeFirstRecordExecutor"
   614	          args:
   615	            stateLogPath: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   616	            executor: "{config.executor}"
   617	            iteration: "{current_iteration}"
   618	        branch_on: "config.executor.type"
   619	        if_native:
   620	          dispatch:
   621	            agent: deep-research
   622	            model: opus
   623	            context_source: "rendered_prompt_pack"
   624	          wait_for_completion: true
   625	        if_cli_codex:
   626	          command: |
   627	            node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'
   628	            import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs';
   629	
   630	            import { runAuditedExecutorCommand } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts';
   631	            import { resolveCodexSandboxMode } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts';
   632	
   633	            const executor = {
   634	              kind: 'cli-codex',
   635	              model: '{config.executor.model}',
   636	              reasoningEffort: '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}',
   637	              serviceTier: '{config.executor.serviceTier}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.serviceTier}',
   638	              sandboxMode: '{config.executor.sandboxMode}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.sandboxMode}',
   639	              timeoutSeconds: Number('{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}'),
   640	            };
   641	
   642	            process.exit(
   643	              runAuditedExecutorCommand({
   644	                command: 'codex',
   645	                args: [
   646	                  'exec',
   647	                  '--model',
   648	                  executor.model,
   649	                  '-c',
   650	                  `model_reasoning_effort=${executor.reasoningEffort}`,
   651	                  '-c',
   652	                  `service_tier=${executor.serviceTier}`,
   653	                  '-c',
   654	                  'approval_policy=never',
   655	                  '--sandbox',
   656	                  resolveCodexSandboxMode(executor.sandboxMode),
   657	                  '-',
   658	                ],
   659	                cwd: '{repo_root}',

   665	              }),
   666	            );
   667	            EOF
   668	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   669	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   670	          wait_for_completion: true
   671	        if_cli_gemini:
   672	          command: |
   673	            node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'
   674	            import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs';
   675	
   676	            import { runAuditedExecutorCommand } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts';
   677	            import { resolveGeminiSandboxMode } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts';
   678	
   679	            const executor = {
   680	              kind: 'cli-gemini',
   681	              model: '{config.executor.model}',
   682	              reasoningEffort: '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}',
   683	              serviceTier: '{config.executor.serviceTier}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.serviceTier}',
   684	              sandboxMode: '{config.executor.sandboxMode}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.sandboxMode}',
   685	              timeoutSeconds: Number('{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}'),
   686	            };
   687	
   688	            process.exit(
   689	              runAuditedExecutorCommand({
   690	                command: 'gemini',
   691	                args: [
   692	                  readFileSync('{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md', 'utf8'),
   693	                  '-m',
   694	                  executor.model,
   695	                  '-s',
   696	                  resolveGeminiSandboxMode(executor.sandboxMode),
   697	                  '-y',
   698	                  '-o',
   699	                  'text',
   700	                ],
   701	                cwd: '{repo_root}',
   702	                timeoutSeconds: executor.timeoutSeconds,
   703	                stateLogPath: '{state_paths.state_log}',
   704	                executor,
   705	                iteration: Number('{current_iteration}'),
   706	              }),
   707	            );
   708	            EOF
   709	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   710	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   711	          wait_for_completion: true
   712	          notes:
   713	            - "gemini accepts positional prompt or stdin; the audited wrapper passes prompt text as the first positional argument"
   714	            - "gemini has no reasoningEffort or serviceTier flags; model is the only lever"
   715	            - "gemini model whitelist enforced at config parse (currently only gemini-3.1-pro-preview)"
   716	        if_cli_claude_code:
   717	          command: |
   718	            node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'
   719	            import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs';
   720	
   721	            import { runAuditedExecutorCommand } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts';
   722	            import { resolveClaudePermissionMode } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts';
   723	
   724	            const executor = {
   725	              kind: 'cli-claude-code',
   726	              model: '{config.executor.model}',
   727	              reasoningEffort: '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}',
   728	              serviceTier: '{config.executor.serviceTier}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.serviceTier}',
   729	              sandboxMode: '{config.executor.sandboxMode}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.sandboxMode}',
   730	              timeoutSeconds: Number('{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}'),
   731	            };
   732	            const args = [
   733	              '-p',
   734	              readFileSync('{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md', 'utf8'),
   735	              '--model',
   736	              executor.model,
   737	              '--permission-mode',
   738	              resolveClaudePermissionMode(executor.sandboxMode),
   739	              '--output-format',
   740	              'text',
   741	            ];
   742	            if (executor.reasoningEffort) {
   743	              args.push('--effort', executor.reasoningEffort);
   744	            }
   745	
   746	            process.exit(
   747	              runAuditedExecutorCommand({
   748	                command: 'claude',
   749	                args,
   750	                cwd: '{repo_root}',
   751	                timeoutSeconds: executor.timeoutSeconds,
   752	                stateLogPath: '{state_paths.state_log}',
   753	                executor,
   754	                iteration: Number('{current_iteration}'),
   755	              }),
   756	            );
   757	            EOF
   758	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   759	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   760	          wait_for_completion: true
   761	          notes:
   762	            - "sandboxMode maps to permission-mode: read-only -> plan, workspace-write -> acceptEdits, danger-full-access -> bypassPermissions"
   763	            - "claude-code has no serviceTier flag"
   764	            - "claude-code supports --effort for reasoning depth"
   765	        record_executor_audit:
   766	          skip_when: "config.executor.type == 'native'"
   767	          target: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   768	          field: "executor"
   769	          value:
   770	            kind: "{config.executor.type}"
   771	            model: "{config.executor.model}"
   772	            reasoningEffort: "{config.executor.reasoningEffort}"
   773	            serviceTier: "{config.executor.serviceTier}"
   774	        if_cli_opencode:
   775	          command: |
   776	            opencode run \
   777	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   778	              --agent general \
   779	              --format json \
   780	              --dangerously-skip-permissions \
   781	              --pure \
   782	              --dir "{repo_root}" \
   783	              {optional_variant_flag} \
   784	              "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   785	              </dev/null
   786	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   787	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   788	          wait_for_completion: true
   789	          render_hint:
   790	            optional_variant_flag: |
   791	              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --variant {config.executor.reasoningEffort}
   792	              Otherwise expand to empty string.
   793	          notes:
   794	            - "opencode run takes a positional message; prompt is fed via command substitution"
   795	            - "--variant maps reasoningEffort to opencode's provider-specific reasoning lever (e.g., high, medium, minimal)"
   796	            - "--dangerously-skip-permissions enables hands-off automation; sandboxMode='read-only' is not currently honored (no opencode equivalent)"
   797	            - "cli-opencode self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-OpenCode dispatch surface (Claude/Codex/Gemini/raw shell). The cli-opencode skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate"
   798	            - "</dev/null required: opencode v1.14.39 reads stdin at startup before session creation. Without explicit closed stdin, automation that redirects stdout/stderr hangs at 0% CPU after `+60s snapshot prune cleanup`. See cli-opencode SKILL.md §4 ALWAYS rule + memory feedback_opencode_run_requires_dev_null_stdin.md."
   799	        if_cli_devin:
   800	          command: |
   801	            AGENT_CONFIG_SRC="{repo_root}/.opencode/skills/cli-devin/assets/agent-config-deep-research-iter.json"
   802	            AGENT_CONFIG_TMP="{state_paths.prompt_dir}/agent-config-iter-{current_iteration}.json"
   803	            DEVIN_STDERR_TMP="{state_paths.prompt_dir}/devin-stderr-iter-{current_iteration}.log"
   804	            DEVIN_STDOUT_TMP="{state_paths.prompt_dir}/devin-stdout-iter-{current_iteration}.log"
   805	            sed -e "s|<repo-root>|{repo_root}|g" -e "s|<packet-root>|{spec_folder}|g" "$AGENT_CONFIG_SRC" > "$AGENT_CONFIG_TMP"
   806	            gtimeout 900 devin --print \
   807	              --prompt-file "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md" \
   808	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   809	              --permission-mode "{resolved_permission_mode}" \
   810	              --agent-config "$AGENT_CONFIG_TMP" \
   811	              </dev/null \
   812	              > "$DEVIN_STDOUT_TMP" 2> "$DEVIN_STDERR_TMP"
   813	            DEVIN_EXIT=$?
   814	            cat "$DEVIN_STDOUT_TMP"
   815	            cat "$DEVIN_STDERR_TMP" >&2
   816	            if [ $DEVIN_EXIT -eq 124 ]; then
   817	              echo "ITER_OUTCOME=timeout" >&2
   818	            elif grep -q "A tool was rejected by the user" "$DEVIN_STDERR_TMP" 2>/dev/null; then
   819	              echo "ITER_OUTCOME=tool_rejected" >&2
   820	            elif grep -qE "(I cannot write|read-only mode|permission errors when attempting to write)" "$DEVIN_STDOUT_TMP" 2>/dev/null; then
   821	              echo "ITER_OUTCOME=degraded_stdout_fallback" >&2
   822	            else
   823	              echo "ITER_OUTCOME=clean" >&2
   824	            fi
   825	            exit $DEVIN_EXIT
   826	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   827	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   828	          wait_for_completion: true
   829	          render_hint:
   830	            resolved_permission_mode: |
   831	              Resolve via resolveDevinPermissionMode(config.executor.sandboxMode) — defined in
   832	              .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts.
   833	              Mapping: sandboxMode='danger-full-access' → 'dangerous', everything else → 'auto'.
   834	              Default (sandboxMode unset): 'auto'. Research iterations are read-only by contract, so 'auto' is the expected resolution.
   835	            agent_config_recipe: |
   836	              The research-iter recipe at .opencode/skills/cli-devin/assets/agent-config-deep-research-iter.json
   837	              ships with literal "<repo-root>" and "<packet-root>" placeholders. The command block substitutes them
   838	              via sed at dispatch time and writes the result to {state_paths.prompt_dir}/agent-config-iter-NNN.json,
   839	              then passes that path to devin --agent-config. The recipe pins allowed_tools (Read+Grep+Glob+Bash)
   840	              and permissions.allow/deny scope expressions (Read(/path/**), Exec(<cmd>)) at Devin's strict parser.
   841	              The narrow Write scope (v1.0.4.0) is anchored at <packet-root> = {spec_folder} so iterations may only
   842	              persist artifacts inside the current packet directory.
   843	              Contract: .opencode/skills/cli-devin/references/deep-loop-iter-contract.md.
   844	              Recipe authoring: .opencode/skills/cli-devin/references/agent-config-recipes.md.
   845	          notes:
   846	            - "devin --prompt-file accepts a path to the rendered iteration prompt (the SKILL.md skill_reference dispatch shape)"
   847	            - "Supported models: swe-1.6 (default), deepseek-v4, glm-5.1, kimi-k2.6 (per DEVIN_SUPPORTED_MODELS in executor-config.ts)"
   848	            - "--permission-mode auto auto-approves read-only ops and prompts on write; dangerous auto-approves all (only for sandboxed runs)"
   849	            - "--agent-config pins the research-iter profile (read-only tool allowlist + Exec scope expressions) at Devin's strict parser. The recipe at cli-devin/assets/agent-config-deep-research-iter.json is substituted via sed at dispatch time to resolve the <repo-root> and <packet-root> placeholders per the recipe authoring contract."
   850	            - "cli-devin self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-Devin dispatch surface (Claude/Codex/Gemini/OpenCode/raw shell). The cli-devin skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate."
   940	        output: "{state_paths.dashboard}"
   941	        note: "Auto-generated from JSONL + reducer registry + strategy. Never manually edited."
   942	
   943	      step_update_tracking:
   944	        action: "Update loop tracking variables"
   945	        set:
   946	          current_iteration: "{current_iteration + 1}"
   947	          stuck_count: "if status == 'thought': unchanged (skip). if status == 'insight': 0 (reset). if newInfoRatio < convergence_threshold: stuck_count + 1, else: 0"
   948	        log: "Iteration {N} complete. newInfoRatio: {newInfoRatio}. Findings: {findings_count}. Stuck count: {stuck_count}."
   949	
   950	      step_loop_decision:
   951	        action: "Return to step_read_state for next iteration"
   952	        goto: step_read_state
   953	
   954	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   955	  # PHASE 3: SYNTHESIS
   956	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   957	  phase_synthesis:
   958	    purpose: Compile all iteration findings into final research/research.md
   959	    steps:
   960	
   961	      step_fanout_merge:
   962	        description: "Merge N lineage registries into one consolidated registry; skip when single-executor"
   963	        skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
   964	        command: |
   965	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-merge.cjs \
   966	            --loop-type research \
   967	            --artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
   968	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   969	        wait_for_completion: true
   970	
   971	      step_hydrate_summary_metrics:
   972	        action: "Hydrate summary metrics before synthesis"
   973	        read:
   974	          - "{state_paths.config}"
   975	          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
   976	          - "{state_paths.registry}"
   977	          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
   978	        extract:
   979	          - iteration_count: "Count lines where type === 'iteration'"
   980	          - current_iteration: "iteration_count + 1"
