 succeeded in 0ms:
   380	
   381	      step_create_strategy:
   382	        action: "Create review strategy file from deep_review_strategy.md template"
   383	        template: .opencode/skills/deep-review/assets/deep_review_strategy.md
   384	        populate:
   385	          review_target: "{review_target}"
   386	          review_target_type: "{review_target_type}"
   387	          dimensions: "{dimension_queue}"
   388	          scope_files: "{review_scope_files}"
   389	          cross_reference_targets: "{cross_reference_targets}"
   390	          max_iterations: "{max_iterations}"
   391	          convergence_threshold: "{convergence_threshold}"
   392	        output: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   393	
   394	      step_enrich_strategy_context:
   395	        action: "Ensure Known Context is written only after strategy.md exists"
   396	        condition: "prior_context_found"
   397	        edit: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   398	        note: "Append or replace the Known Context section with prior_context_summary and retained detail from prior_context"
   399	
   400	      step_enrich_strategy_resource_map:
   401	        action: "Inject resource-map status into Known Context after strategy.md exists"
   402	        edit: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   403	        note: "When resource_map_present is true, append the resource_map_known_context snapshot and add Resource Map Coverage to the Review Charter. When false, append 'resource-map.md not present; skipping coverage gate'."
   404	
   405	      step_init_complete:
   406	        log: "Initialization complete. Config, state, and strategy files created. Review scope: {review_scope_files_count} files, {dimension_queue_count} dimensions."
   407	        set: { current_iteration: 1, stuck_count: 0, p0_count: 0, p1_count: 0, p2_count: 0 }
   408	
   409	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   410	  # PHASE 2: ITERATION LOOP
   411	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   412	  phase_loop:
   413	    purpose: Dispatch review agent iterations until convergence
   414	    repeat: true
   415	    max_repeats: "{max_iterations}"
   416	    steps:
   417	
   418	      step_read_state:
   419	        action: "Read current state from JSONL, strategy, and config"
   420	        read:
   421	          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
   422	          - "{state_paths.findings_registry}"
   423	          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
   424	          - "{state_paths.config}"
   425	        extract:
   426	          - iteration_count: "Count lines where type === 'iteration'"
   427	          - current_iteration: "iteration_count + 1"
   428	          - last_newFindingsRatio: "Extract newFindingsRatio from last iteration record"
   429	          - last_focus: "Extract focus/dimension from latest iteration record, else 'none yet'"
   430	          - ratio_prev: "Extract newFindingsRatio from second-latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
   431	          - ratio_latest: "Extract newFindingsRatio from latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
   432	          - next_dimension: "Next uncovered dimension from dimension_queue in strategy.md"
   433	          - dimensions_covered: "List of dimensions already reviewed"
   434	          - dimensions_remaining: "List of dimensions not yet reviewed"
   435	          - dimension_coverage: "covered / total dimensions"
   436	          - coverage_age: "Iterations since dimension coverage last changed; require >= 1 before STOP"
   437	          - p0_count: "Count P0 findings across all iterations"
   438	          - p1_count: "Count P1 findings across all iterations"
   439	          - p2_count: "Count P2 findings across all iterations"
   440	          - resource_map_present: "Extract boolean from deep-review-config.json, default false"
   441	          - resource_map_prompt_line: "If resource_map_present is true, return 'Resource Map Coverage: cross-check target_files from {spec_folder}/applied/T-*.md against {spec_folder}/resource-map.md and classify only missed coverage as gaps.' Else return 'Resource Map Coverage: resource-map.md not present; skipping coverage gate.'"
   442	          - session_id: "Extract sessionId from deep-review-config.json"
   443	          - generation: "Extract generation from deep-review-config.json, else 1"
   444	          - last_3_summaries: "Summarize the latest 3 iteration records as 'run N: dimension (ratio, P0/P1/P2)'"
   445	          - latest_status: "Extract status from latest iteration record, else 'none yet'"
   446	          - last_claim_adjudication_passed: "Scan state.jsonl for the most recent `claim_adjudication` event; use its `passed` boolean. Default true when no event exists or when activeP0 + activeP1 == 0 (gate is vacuous without adjudicable findings)."
   447	          - claim_adjudication_active_count: "Count of active P0/P1 findings at the time of the last claim_adjudication event; 0 when none exist"
   448	          - security_sensitive_fix_scope: "Boolean true when the current review is a rerun after fixes involving security, path disclosure, auth/authz, sandboxing, env precedence, public schemas, persistence, or user-visible error payloads; derive from the latest review report, remediation notes, or planning packet when present, else false."
   449	          - fix_completeness_replay_required_rows: "Count prior active or remediated P0/P1 findings, plus any prior security/path P2 findings, that require closed-gate replay before STOP."
   450	          - fix_completeness_replay_passing_rows: "Count required replay rows marked PASS with file:line or command evidence and producer/consumer/matrix coverage."
   451	
   452	      step_check_pause_sentinel:
   453	        action: "Check for pause sentinel file"
   454	        check: "Does {state_paths.pause_sentinel} exist?"
   455	        if_exists:
   456	          set:
   457	            pending_stop_event: "paused"
   458	            pending_stop_reason: "userPaused"
   459	            pending_stop_detail: "sentinel file detected"
   460	          skip_to: step_normalize_pause_events
   461	        if_not_exists:
   462	          proceed: true
   463	
   464	      step_graph_convergence:
   465	        action: "Evaluate coverage-graph convergence before the inline review convergence vote"
   466	        inspect:
   467	          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
   468	          - "{state_paths.findings_registry}"
   469	        transform: |
   470	          1. Call graph convergence on the current review lineage before the inline 3-signal vote.
   471	          2. Record the decision as one of CONTINUE, STOP_ALLOWED, STOP_BLOCKED.
   472	          3. Preserve raw graph signals and blockers for reducer rollup and blocked-stop evidence.
   473	          4. Normalize blockers to both JSON array and CSV forms for downstream stop handling.
   474	          5. Set graph_stop_blocked = true only when graph_decision == "STOP_BLOCKED".
   475	        bash: 'node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/convergence.cjs --spec-folder "{spec_folder}" --loop-type "review" --session-id "{session_id}"'
   476	        note: "Invoke the runtime script directly. Review-side graph convergence must run before the inline review stop vote."
   477	        append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"graph_convergence","mode":"review","run":{current_iteration},"decision":"{graph_decision}","signals":{graph_signals_json},"blockers":{graph_blockers_json},"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{session_id}","generation":{generation}}'
   478	        outputs:
   479	          - graph_decision: "CONTINUE | STOP_ALLOWED | STOP_BLOCKED"
   480	          - graph_signals_json: "JSON object returned by convergence.cjs"
   481	          - graph_blockers_json: "JSON array of graph blockers when present, else []"
   482	          - graph_blockers_csv: "Comma-separated blocker summary when graph blocks STOP, else empty string"
   483	          - graph_stop_blocked: "Boolean true when graph_decision == STOP_BLOCKED"
   484	
   485	      step_check_convergence:
   486	        action: "Evaluate graph-assisted review stop conditions and the legal-stop decision tree"
   487	        algorithm: |
   488	          0. CLAIM-ADJUDICATION PRE-CHECK (universal STOP veto; runs before hard stops and composite convergence):
   489	             claim_adjudication_gate_pass = (last_claim_adjudication_passed != false) OR (p0_count + p1_count == 0)
   490	             If claim_adjudication_gate_pass == false:
   491	               candidate_decision = "BLOCKED"
   492	               stop_blocked = true
   493	               stopReason = "blockedStop"
   494	               blocked_gates = ["claimAdjudicationGate"]
   495	               recovery_strategy = "Reviewer must add typed claim-adjudication packets (claim, evidenceRefs, counterevidenceSought, alternativeExplanation, finalSeverity, confidence, downgradeTrigger) for every active P0/P1 finding before STOP is allowed."
   496	               Skip hard stops (1) and composite convergence (4); proceed directly to step 5 legal-stop decision-tree assembly so blocked_by_json, gate outputs, and the blocked_stop event still populate consistently.
   497	          1. HARD STOPS:
   498	             a) if iteration_count >= max_iterations: set decision = "STOP", stopReason = "maxIterationsReached", hard_stop_reason = "max_iterations_reached", preserve any failed legal-stop gates as terminal evidence, and proceed to synthesis without legal-stop veto
   499	             b) if all dimensions clean AND required traceability protocols are covered AND p0_count == 0 AND p1_count == 0 AND coverage_age >= 1 AND all quality gates pass (evidence: every P0/P1 has file:line; scope: all findings within target; coverage: all dimensions reviewed): mark hard_stop_reason = "all_dimensions_clean" and promote to STOP candidate
   500	             Operator stop reasons (`maxIterationsReached`, `manualStop`, `userPaused`, unrecoverable `error`) are terminal ceilings. They do not hide failed gates; they record them in synthesis and stop dispatch.
   680	      step_marker_scan:
   681	        action: "H-2 loop-prevention guard: scan previous iteration's rendered prompt for nested review marker"
   682	        algorithm: |
   683	          if current_iteration > 1:
   684	            PREV_PROMPT_PATH = "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{previous_iteration}.md"
   685	            if file_exists(PREV_PROMPT_PATH):
   686	              PREV_PROMPT_FIRST_LINE = head -1 of PREV_PROMPT_PATH
   687	              if PREV_PROMPT_FIRST_LINE matches ^(DEEP-REVIEW|DEEP-RESEARCH|CODE-REVIEW)$:
   688	                log "ERROR: nested review-of-review loop detected (marker found in previous iteration prompt). Aborting."
   689	                halt with exit code 2
   690	        note: |
   691	          False-positive prevention: only matches when the first line is exactly one of the
   692	          three canonical markers. Markers appearing in comments or body text are ignored.
   693	          True-positive triggers only when a previous iteration's rendered prompt literally
   694	          starts with a deep-loop marker, indicating a nested review-of-review dispatch.
   695	
   696	      step_dispatch_iteration:
   697	        action: "Dispatch @deep-review agent for one review iteration"
   698	        resolve_executor:
   699	          source: "config.executor"
   700	          loader: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts#parseExecutorConfig"
   701	        pre_dispatch:
   702	          generate_summary: |
   703	            STATE SUMMARY (auto-generated):
   704	            Iteration: {current_iteration} of {max_iterations}
   705	            Dimension: {next_dimension}
   706	            Prior Findings: P0={p0_count} P1={p1_count} P2={p2_count}
   707	            Dimension Coverage: {dimensions_covered_list} ({dimension_coverage})
   708	            Traceability: core={core_protocol_status} overlay={overlay_protocol_status}
   709	            {resource_map_prompt_line}
   710	            Coverage Age: {coverage_age}
   711	            Last 2 ratios: {ratio_prev} -> {ratio_latest}
   712	            Stuck count: {stuck_count}
   713	            Provisional Verdict: {PASS|CONDITIONAL|FAIL|PENDING} hasAdvisories={has_advisories}
   714	          render_prompt_pack:
   715	            template_path: ".opencode/skills/deep-review/assets/prompt_pack_iteration.md.tmpl"
   716	            renderer: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/prompt-pack.ts#renderPromptPack"
   717	            output_path: "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md"
   718	            variables:
   719	              state_summary: "{state_summary}"
   720	              current_iteration: "{current_iteration}"
   721	              max_iterations: "{max_iterations}"
   722	              next_dimension: "{next_dimension}"
   723	              review_target: "{review_target}"
   724	              review_scope_files: "{review_scope_files}"
   725	              p0_count: "{p0_count}"
   726	              p1_count: "{p1_count}"
   727	              p2_count: "{p2_count}"
   728	              state_paths_config: "{state_paths.config}"
   729	              state_paths_state_log: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   730	              state_paths_findings_registry: "{state_paths.findings_registry}"
   731	              state_paths_strategy: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   732	              state_paths_iteration_pattern: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   733	              state_paths_delta_pattern: "{state_paths.delta_pattern}"
   734	        pre_dispatch_audit:
   735	          skip_when: "config.executor.kind == 'native'"
   736	          call: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts#writeFirstRecordExecutor"
   737	          args:
   738	            stateLogPath: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   739	            executor: "{config.executor}"
   740	            iteration: "{current_iteration}"
   741	        branch_on: "config.executor.kind"
   742	        if_native:
   743	          dispatch:
   744	            agent: deep-review
   745	            model: opus
   746	            context_source: "rendered_prompt_pack"
   747	          wait_for_completion: true
   748	        if_cli_codex:
   749	          command: |
   750	            node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'
   751	            import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs';
   752	
   753	            import { runAuditedExecutorCommandAsync } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts';
   754	            import { resolveCodexSandboxMode } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts';
   755	
   756	            const executor = {
   757	              kind: 'cli-codex',
   758	              model: '{config.executor.model}',
   759	              reasoningEffort: '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}',
   760	              serviceTier: '{config.executor.serviceTier}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.serviceTier}',
   761	              sandboxMode: '{config.executor.sandboxMode}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.sandboxMode}',
   762	              timeoutSeconds: Number('{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}'),
   763	            };
   764	
   765	            process.exit(await runAuditedExecutorCommandAsync({
   766	              command: 'codex',
   767	              args: [
   768	                'exec',
   769	                '--model',
   770	                executor.model,
   771	                '-c',
   772	                `model_reasoning_effort=${executor.reasoningEffort}`,
   773	                '-c',
   774	                `service_tier=${executor.serviceTier}`,
   775	                '-c',
   776	                'approval_policy=never',
   777	                '--sandbox',
   778	                resolveCodexSandboxMode(executor.sandboxMode),
   779	                '-',
   780	              ],
   781	              cwd: '{repo_root}',
   782	              timeoutSeconds: executor.timeoutSeconds,
   783	              stateLogPath: '{state_paths.state_log}',
   784	              executor,
   785	              iteration: Number('{current_iteration}'),
   786	              input: readFileSync('{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md', 'utf8'),
   787	            }));
   788	            EOF
   789	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   790	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   791	          wait_for_completion: true
   792	        if_cli_copilot:
   793	          command: |
   794	            node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'
   795	            import { readFileSync, writeFileSync } from 'node:fs';
   796	            import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process';
   797	
   798	            import { buildCopilotPromptArg } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts';
   799	
   800	            const promptPath = '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md';
   801	            const prompt = readFileSync(promptPath, 'utf8');
   802	
   803	            // Workflow-resolved spec folder is the only legal write authority.
   804	            // The helper (`validateSpecFolder` inside `buildCopilotPromptArg`)
   805	            // is the single source of truth for rejecting empty / unresolved
   806	            // template / whitespace-only / string-coerced empty values. The
   807	            // YAML hands the raw `{spec_folder}` directly; on rejection the
   808	            // helper safe-fails to `type:"missing", writeIntent:true` (Gate-3
   809	            // enforcement, --allow-all-tools stripped).
   810	            const specFolderRaw = '{spec_folder}';
   811	            const targetAuthority = { type: 'approved', specFolder: specFolderRaw };
   812	
   813	            const baseArgs = [
   814	              '-p',
   815	              prompt,
   816	              '--model',
   817	              '{config.executor.model}',
   818	              '--allow-all-tools',
   819	              '--no-ask-user',
   820	            ];
   821	
   822	            const built = buildCopilotPromptArg({
   823	              promptPath,
   824	              prompt,
   825	              targetAuthority,
   826	              baseArgv: baseArgs,
   827	            });
   828	
   829	            // Large-prompt @PROMPT_PATH wrapper: helper emits a `promptFileBody`
   830	            // containing `<TARGET AUTHORITY preamble>\n\n---\n\n<original>`.
   831	            // Write it to disk so the file Copilot reads via @path opens with
   832	            // the authority block. Without this, recovered/bootstrap folder
   833	            // mentions inside the file could still anchor the model.
   834	            if (built.promptFileBody !== undefined) {
   835	              writeFileSync(promptPath, built.promptFileBody, 'utf8');
   836	            }
   837	
   838	            const result = spawnSync('copilot', built.argv, {
   839	              cwd: '{repo_root}',
   840	              stdio: 'inherit',
   841	              timeout: Number('{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}') * 1000,
   842	            });
   843	            process.exit(result.status ?? 1);
   844	            EOF
   845	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   846	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   847	          wait_for_completion: true
   848	          notes:
   849	            - "copilot has no stdin support; prompt is positional"
   850	            - "Size check uses 16KB threshold; above that uses @PROMPT_PATH wrapper prompt"
   851	            - "Large-prompt path relies on copilot honoring @path references within its prompt string"
   852	            - "buildCopilotPromptArg attaches a TARGET AUTHORITY preamble bound to the workflow-approved spec folder; recovered context cannot override it (authority guard source: .opencode/commands/speckit/assets/speckit_deep-review_auto.yaml)"
   853	            - "If spec_folder is missing/malformed/unresolved on a write-intent dispatch, the helper enforces plan-only by replacing the prompt with a Gate-3 question and stripping --allow-all-tools"
   854	            - "Large-prompt wrapper mode rewrites the prompt file at promptPath to include the TARGET AUTHORITY preamble (prefix + divider + original body); the argv becomes a bare @promptPath reference"
   855	        if_cli_gemini:
   856	          command: |
   857	            gemini \
   858	              "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   859	              -m "{config.executor.model}" \
   860	              -s none \
   861	              -y \
   862	              -o text
   863	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   864	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   865	          wait_for_completion: true
   866	          notes:
   867	            - "gemini accepts positional prompt or stdin; we use positional via command substitution"
   868	            - "gemini has no reasoningEffort or serviceTier flags; model is the only lever"
   869	            - "gemini model whitelist enforced at config parse (currently only gemini-3.1-pro-preview)"
   870	        if_cli_claude_code:
   871	          command: |
   872	            claude \
   873	              -p "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   874	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   875	              --permission-mode acceptEdits \
   876	              --output-format text \
   877	              {optional_effort_flag}
   878	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   879	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   880	          wait_for_completion: true
   881	          render_hint:
   882	            optional_effort_flag: |
   883	              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --effort {config.executor.reasoningEffort}
   884	              Otherwise expand to empty string.
   885	          notes:
   886	            - "claude-code default permission-mode is 'plan' (read-only); we override to 'acceptEdits' for iteration writes"
   887	            - "claude-code has no serviceTier flag"
   888	            - "claude-code supports --effort for reasoning depth"
   889	        if_cli_opencode:
   890	          command: |
   891	            opencode run \
   892	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   893	              --agent general \
   894	              --format json \
   895	              --dangerously-skip-permissions \
   896	              --pure \
   897	              --dir "{repo_root}" \
   898	              {optional_variant_flag} \
   899	              "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   900	              </dev/null
   901	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   902	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   903	          wait_for_completion: true
   904	          render_hint:
   905	            optional_variant_flag: |
   906	              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --variant {config.executor.reasoningEffort}
   907	              Otherwise expand to empty string.
   908	          notes:
   909	            - "opencode run takes a positional message; prompt is fed via command substitution"
   910	            - "--variant maps reasoningEffort to opencode's provider-specific reasoning lever (e.g., high, medium, minimal)"
   911	            - "--dangerously-skip-permissions enables hands-off automation; sandboxMode='read-only' is not currently honored (no opencode equivalent)"
   912	            - "cli-opencode self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-OpenCode dispatch surface (Claude/Codex/Gemini/raw shell). The cli-opencode skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate"
   913	            - "</dev/null required: opencode v1.14.39 reads stdin at startup before session creation. Without explicit closed stdin, automation that redirects stdout/stderr hangs at 0% CPU after `+60s snapshot prune cleanup`. See cli-opencode SKILL.md §4 ALWAYS rule + memory feedback_opencode_run_requires_dev_null_stdin.md."
   914	        if_cli_devin:
   915	          command: |
   916	            AGENT_CONFIG_SRC="{repo_root}/.opencode/skills/cli-devin/assets/agent-config-deep-review-iter.json"
   917	            AGENT_CONFIG_TMP="{state_paths.prompt_dir}/agent-config-iter-{current_iteration}.json"
   918	            DEVIN_STDERR_TMP="{state_paths.prompt_dir}/devin-stderr-iter-{current_iteration}.log"
   919	            DEVIN_STDOUT_TMP="{state_paths.prompt_dir}/devin-stdout-iter-{current_iteration}.log"
   920	            sed -e "s|<repo-root>|{repo_root}|g" -e "s|<packet-root>|{spec_folder}|g" "$AGENT_CONFIG_SRC" > "$AGENT_CONFIG_TMP"
   921	            gtimeout 900 devin --print \
   922	              --prompt-file "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md" \
   923	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   924	              --permission-mode "{resolved_permission_mode}" \
   925	              --agent-config "$AGENT_CONFIG_TMP" \
   926	              </dev/null \
   927	              > "$DEVIN_STDOUT_TMP" 2> "$DEVIN_STDERR_TMP"
   928	            DEVIN_EXIT=$?
   929	            cat "$DEVIN_STDOUT_TMP"
   930	            cat "$DEVIN_STDERR_TMP" >&2
   931	            if [ $DEVIN_EXIT -eq 124 ]; then
   932	              echo "ITER_OUTCOME=timeout" >&2
   933	            elif grep -q "A tool was rejected by the user" "$DEVIN_STDERR_TMP" 2>/dev/null; then
   934	              echo "ITER_OUTCOME=tool_rejected" >&2
   935	            elif grep -qE "(I cannot write|read-only mode|permission errors when attempting to write)" "$DEVIN_STDOUT_TMP" 2>/dev/null; then
   936	              echo "ITER_OUTCOME=degraded_stdout_fallback" >&2
   937	            else
   938	              echo "ITER_OUTCOME=clean" >&2
   939	            fi
   940	            exit $DEVIN_EXIT
   941	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   942	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   943	          wait_for_completion: true
   944	          render_hint:
   945	            resolved_permission_mode: |
   946	              Resolve via resolveDevinPermissionMode(config.executor.sandboxMode) — defined in
   947	              .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts.
   948	              Mapping: sandboxMode='danger-full-access' → 'dangerous', everything else → 'auto'.
   949	              Default (sandboxMode unset): 'auto'.
   950	            agent_config_recipe: |
   951	              The review-iter recipe at .opencode/skills/cli-devin/assets/agent-config-deep-review-iter.json
   952	              ships with literal "<repo-root>" and "<packet-root>" placeholders. The command block substitutes
   953	              them via sed at dispatch time and writes the result to {state_paths.prompt_dir}/agent-config-iter-NNN.json,
   954	              then passes that path to devin --agent-config. The recipe pins the narrower allowed_tools
   955	              (Read+Grep+Glob, no Bash) and Read-only permissions.allow at Devin's strict parser. The narrow
   956	              Write scope (v1.0.4.0) is anchored at <packet-root> = {spec_folder} so iterations may only persist
   957	              artifacts inside the current packet directory.
   958	              Contract: .opencode/skills/cli-devin/references/deep-loop-iter-contract.md.
   959	              Recipe authoring: .opencode/skills/cli-devin/references/agent-config-recipes.md.
   960	          notes:
   961	            - "devin --prompt-file accepts a path to the rendered iteration prompt (the SKILL.md skill_reference dispatch shape)"
   962	            - "Supported models: swe-1.6 (default), deepseek-v4, glm-5.1, kimi-k2.6 (per DEVIN_SUPPORTED_MODELS in executor-config.ts)"
   963	            - "--permission-mode auto auto-approves read-only ops and prompts on write; dangerous auto-approves all (only for sandboxed runs)"
   964	            - "--agent-config pins the review-iter profile (narrower than research-iter — Read+Grep+Glob only, no Bash) at Devin's strict parser. The recipe at cli-devin/assets/agent-config-deep-review-iter.json is substituted via sed at dispatch time to resolve the <repo-root> and <packet-root> placeholders per the recipe authoring contract."
   965	            - "cli-devin self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-Devin dispatch surface (Claude/Codex/Gemini/OpenCode/raw shell). The cli-devin skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate."
   966	            - "</dev/null required: family convention for non-interactive dispatch to avoid stdin-blocking edge cases across CLI versions"
   967	            - "Cloud handoff is NOT used here — each iteration runs locally with convergence detection. See cli-devin references/cloud_handoff.md for the separate cloud-handoff route."
   968	            - "Reasoning effort is NOT exposed by Devin's CLI surface; reasoning depth is fixed per model (e.g., swe-1.6 vs deepseek-v4). serviceTier is also N/A."
   969	            - "v1.0.4.0: dispatch wrapped in gtimeout 900 (15 min cap per iter) to prevent silent hangs; exit code 124 is gtimeout's signal and surfaces as ITER_OUTCOME=timeout on stderr"
   970	            - "v1.0.4.0: stderr captured to {state_paths.prompt_dir}/devin-stderr-iter-NNN.log and scanned for 'A tool was rejected by the user' (Devin runtime approval gate firing inside --permission-mode auto); ITER_OUTCOME=tool_rejected flagged so the post_dispatch_validate / reducer can skip the iter cleanly without inheriting a stuck-style failure"
   971	            - "v1.0.4.0: stdout captured to {state_paths.prompt_dir}/devin-stdout-iter-NNN.log and scanned for stdout-fallback boilerplate ('I cannot write', 'read-only mode', 'permission errors when attempting to write'); ITER_OUTCOME=degraded_stdout_fallback flagged so the JSONL row can be tagged dispatch_quality=degraded for the synthesis phase"
   972	            - "v1.0.4.0: <packet-root> substitution added to the agent-config sed pipeline so the review-iter recipe's narrow Write scope resolves to {spec_folder} at dispatch time"
   973	        post_dispatch_validate:
   974	          validator: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/post-dispatch-validate.ts#validateIterationOutputs"
   975	          assert_exists: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   976	          assert_appended: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   977	          assert_jsonl_fields: [type, iteration, mode, run, status, focus, dimensions, filesReviewed, findingsCount, findingsSummary, findingsNew, findingDetails, newFindingsRatio, sessionId, generation, lineageMode, timestamp, durationMs]
   978	          assert_canonical_type: "iteration"
   979	          assert_delta_file_exists: "{state_paths.delta_pattern}"
   980	          assert_delta_file_has_iteration_record: true
   981	          failure_reasons:
   982	            - iteration_file_missing
   983	            - iteration_file_empty
   984	            - jsonl_not_appended
   985	            - jsonl_missing_fields
   986	            - jsonl_parse_error
   987	            - jsonl_wrong_type
   988	            - delta_file_missing
   989	            - delta_file_empty
   990	            - delta_file_missing_iteration_record
   991	            - executor_missing
   992	            - dispatch_failure_logged
   993	            - v2_missing_ledger
   994	            - v2_uncited_ledger_row
   995	            - v2_broken_linked_finding
   996	            - v2_shallow_finding_details
   997	            - delta_iteration_id_mismatch
   998	            - state_delta_iteration_mismatch
   999	          warning_surface:
  1000	            source: "result.warnings"
  1001	            action: "emit schema_advisory canonical conflict event"
  1002	            severity: "advisory"
  1003	            event_shape: '{"type":"event","event":"schema_advisory","mode":"review","iteration":{current_iteration},"warnings":{result.warnings},"severity":"advisory","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
  1004	            note: "Warnings do not fail dispatch. Hard failures still emit schema_mismatch through on_failure."
  1005	          on_failure:
  1006	            action: "emit schema_mismatch canonical conflict event"
  1007	            escalation: "After 3 consecutive failures, trigger stuck_recovery event with diagnostic context"
  1008	        record_executor_audit:
  1009	          skip_when: "config.executor.kind == 'native'"
  1010	          target: "{state_paths.state_log}"
  1011	          field: "executor"
  1012	          value:
  1013	            kind: "{config.executor.kind}"
  1014	            model: "{config.executor.model}"
  1015	            reasoningEffort: "{config.executor.reasoningEffort}"
  1016	            serviceTier: "{config.executor.serviceTier}"
  1017	
  1018	      step_evaluate_results:
  1019	        action: "Verify iteration outputs and extract metrics"
  1020	        verify:
  1021	          - file_exists: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
  1022	          - jsonl_appended: "New iteration record in state.jsonl"
  1023	          - strategy_updated: "Strategy.md has been modified"
  1024	        extract:
  1025	          - newFindingsRatio: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
  1026	          - findings_count: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
  1027	          - severity_counts: "From latest JSONL iteration record (P0, P1, P2)"
  1028	          - dimensions: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
  1029	          - files_reviewed: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
  1030	          - status: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
  1168	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  1169	  phase_synthesis:
  1170	    purpose: Compile all iteration findings into review/review-report.md
  1171	    steps:
  1172	
  1173	      step_fanout_merge:
  1174	        description: "Merge N lineage registries with strongest-restriction; bind p0/p1/p2 counts for step_derive_verdict; skip when single-executor"
  1175	        skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
  1176	        command: |
  1177	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-merge.cjs \
  1178	            --loop-type review \
  1179	            --artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
  1180	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
  1181	        wait_for_completion: true
  1182	        bind_from_output:
  1183	          p0_count: "active_p0"
  1184	          p1_count: "active_p1"
  1185	          p2_count: "active_p2"
  1186	
  1187	      step_hydrate_summary_metrics:
  1188	        action: "Hydrate summary metrics before synthesis"

 succeeded in 0ms:
   110	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   111	# WORKFLOW
   112	# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   113	workflow:
   114	
   115	  step_resolve_artifact_root:
   116	    description: "Resolve artifact directory — use fan-out lineage override when provided, else resolve from spec_folder"
   117	    note: "Root specs keep review artifacts directly in {spec_folder}/review/. Child phases and sub-phases keep local packet directories in {spec_folder}/review/{packet}/, and archives stay local at {spec_folder}/review_archive/{packet}/."
   118	    branch_on: "config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir"
   119	    if_present:
   120	      bind:
   121	        artifact_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
   122	        artifact_root_dir: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}"
   123	        artifact_subfolder: null
   124	        artifact_archive_root: "{config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir}/_archive"
   125	    if_absent:
   126	      command: "node -e \"const { resolveArtifactRoot } = require('.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/shared/review-research-paths.cjs'); console.log(JSON.stringify(resolveArtifactRoot('{spec_folder}', 'review')));\""
   127	      outputs:
   128	        - artifact_root_dir: "Resolved local review owner directory"
   129	        - artifact_subfolder: "Local packet subfolder ({ownerSlug}-pt-{NN}), else null"
   130	        - artifact_dir: "Resolved review packet directory for this target"
   131	        - artifact_archive_root: "Resolved local review archive directory for this target"
   132	
   133	  step_fanout_spawn:
   134	    description: "Spawn fan-out lineages; skip and proceed to phase_init normally when single-executor"
   135	    skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
   136	    instructions: |
   137	      Fan-out mode is active. Spawn all lineages. Each lineage runs the full loop in its own
   138	      isolated sub-packet under {artifact_dir}/lineages/{label}/.
   139	      After all lineages complete, jump directly to phase_synthesis — skip phase_init and
   140	      phase_main_loop entirely (those are the single-executor path). The merge step in
   141	      phase_synthesis will consolidate results across all lineages.
   142	    sub_steps:
   143	      step_fanout_spawn_cli:
   144	        description: "Spawn all CLI lineages in capped worker pool"
   145	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind != 'native'"
   146	        command: |
   147	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-run.cjs \
   148	            --spec-folder {spec_folder} \
   149	            --loop-type review \
   150	            --fanout-config-json '{config.fanout_json}' \
   151	            --base-artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
   152	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   153	        wait_for_completion: true
   154	      step_fanout_spawn_native:
   155	        description: "Dispatch each native lineage as a sequential deep-review sub-agent"
   156	        skip_when: "no entries in config.fanout.executors with kind == 'native'"
   157	        for_each: "lineage in expanded native entries of config.fanout"
   158	        dispatch:
   159	          agent: deep-review
   160	          model: opus
   161	          context: |
   162	            Execute the deep-review loop with these parameters:
   163	              spec_folder: {spec_folder}
   164	              config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir: {artifact_dir}/lineages/{lineage.label}
   165	              session_id: fanout-{lineage.label}-{fanout_run_id}
   166	              executor: native
   167	            Run to convergence. Write all outputs to the override directory.
   168	        wait_for_completion: true
   169	
   170	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   360	      step_create_state_log:
   361	        action: "Initialize JSONL state log with config record including review fields and lineage metadata"
   362	        note: "Reuse review_dimensions_json from step_normalize_review_dimensions. Never re-normalize or wrap the raw template value."
   363	        content: '{"type":"config","mode":"review","reviewTarget":"{review_target}","reviewTargetType":"{review_target_type}","reviewDimensions":{review_dimensions_json},"resource_map_present":{resource_map_present},"resource_map":{"emit":true},"sessionId":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","parentSessionId":null,"lineageMode":"new","generation":1,"continuedFromRun":null,"maxIterations":{max_iterations},"convergenceThreshold":{convergence_threshold},"createdAt":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","specFolder":"{spec_folder}"}'
   364	        output: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   365	
   366	      step_create_findings_registry:
   367	        action: "Initialize reducer-owned review findings registry"
   368	        content: '{"sessionId":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","generation":1,"lineageMode":"new","openFindings":[],"resolvedFindings":[],"repeatedFindings":[],"dimensionCoverage":{"correctness":false,"security":false,"traceability":false,"maintainability":false},"findingsBySeverity":{"P0":0,"P1":0,"P2":0},"openFindingsCount":0,"resolvedFindingsCount":0,"convergenceScore":0.0}'
   369	        output: "{state_paths.findings_registry}"
   370	
   371	      step_create_strategy:
   372	        action: "Create review strategy file from deep_review_strategy.md template"
   373	        template: .opencode/skills/deep-review/assets/deep_review_strategy.md
   374	        populate:
   375	          review_target: "{review_target}"
   376	          review_target_type: "{review_target_type}"
   377	          dimensions: "{dimension_queue}"
   378	          scope_files: "{review_scope_files}"
   379	          cross_reference_targets: "{cross_reference_targets}"
   380	          max_iterations: "{max_iterations}"
   381	          convergence_threshold: "{convergence_threshold}"
   382	        output: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   383	
   384	      step_enrich_strategy_context:
   385	        action: "Ensure Known Context is written only after strategy.md exists"
   386	        condition: "prior_context_found"
   387	        edit: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   388	        note: "Append or replace the Known Context section with prior_context_summary and retained detail from prior_context"
   389	
   390	      # ─── APPROVAL GATE: Post-Init ───
   391	      gate_init_approval:
   392	        type: approval_gate
   393	        purpose: "Show review scope, dimensions, and target files. Get approval to start loop."
   394	        present: |
   395	          ## Review Initialization Complete
   396	
   397	          **Review Target**: {review_target} ({review_target_type})
   398	          **Scope**: {review_scope_files_count} files
   399	          **Dimensions**: {dimension_queue}
   400	          **Max Iterations**: {max_iterations}
   401	          **Convergence Threshold**: {convergence_threshold}
   402	          **Known Context Summary**: {prior_context_summary}
   403	
   404	          **Files in scope:**
   405	          {review_scope_files_summary}
   406	
   407	          Review `{state_paths.strategy}` for the full scope and dimension ordering.
   408	          **State files located in**: {state_paths.packet_dir}/
   409	
   410	          Options:
   411	          A) Start review loop
   412	          B) Adjust scope or dimensions
   413	          C) Cancel
   414	        wait_for: "User response"
   415	        on_A: { set: { current_iteration: 1, stuck_count: 0, p0_count: 0, p1_count: 0, p2_count: 0 }, proceed_to: phase_loop }
   416	        on_B: { action: "Apply user adjustments to strategy.md, scope, or dimensions", return_to: gate_init_approval }
   417	        on_C: { action: "Cancel workflow", status: "CANCELLED" }
   418	
   419	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   420	  # PHASE 2: ITERATION LOOP
   421	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   422	  phase_loop:
   423	    purpose: Dispatch review agent iterations with approval at each step
   424	    repeat: true
   425	    max_repeats: "{max_iterations}"
   426	    steps:
   427	
   428	      step_read_state:
   429	        action: "Read current state from JSONL, strategy, and config"
   430	        read:
   431	          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
   432	          - "{state_paths.findings_registry}"
   433	          - "{state_paths.strategy}"
   434	          - "{state_paths.config}"
   435	        extract:
   436	          - iteration_count: "Count lines where type === 'iteration'"
   437	          - current_iteration: "iteration_count + 1"
   438	          - last_newFindingsRatio: "Extract newFindingsRatio from last iteration record"
   439	          - last_focus: "Extract focus/dimension from latest iteration record, else 'none yet'"
   440	          - ratio_prev: "Extract newFindingsRatio from second-latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
   441	          - ratio_latest: "Extract newFindingsRatio from latest iteration record, else 'N/A'"
   442	          - next_dimension: "Next uncovered dimension from dimension_queue in strategy.md"
   443	          - dimensions_covered: "List of dimensions already reviewed"
   444	          - dimensions_remaining: "List of dimensions not yet reviewed"
   445	          - dimension_coverage: "covered / total dimensions"
   446	          - coverage_age: "Iterations since dimension coverage last changed; require >= 1 before STOP"
   447	          - p0_count: "Count P0 findings across all iterations"
   448	          - p1_count: "Count P1 findings across all iterations"
   449	          - p2_count: "Count P2 findings across all iterations"
   450	          - session_id: "Extract sessionId from deep-review-config.json"
   451	          - generation: "Extract generation from deep-review-config.json, else 1"
   452	          - last_3_summaries: "Summarize the latest 3 iteration records as 'run N: dimension (ratio, P0/P1/P2)'"
   453	          - latest_status: "Extract status from latest iteration record, else 'none yet'"
   454	          - last_claim_adjudication_passed: "Scan state.jsonl for the most recent `claim_adjudication` event; use its `passed` boolean. Default true when no event exists or when activeP0 + activeP1 == 0 (gate is vacuous without adjudicable findings)."
   455	          - claim_adjudication_active_count: "Count of active P0/P1 findings at the time of the last claim_adjudication event; 0 when none exist"
   456	          - security_sensitive_fix_scope: "Boolean true when the current review is a rerun after fixes involving security, path disclosure, auth/authz, sandboxing, env precedence, public schemas, persistence, or user-visible error payloads; derive from the latest review report, remediation notes, or planning packet when present, else false."
   457	          - fix_completeness_replay_required_rows: "Count prior active or remediated P0/P1 findings, plus any prior security/path P2 findings, that require closed-gate replay before STOP."
   458	          - fix_completeness_replay_passing_rows: "Count required replay rows marked PASS with file:line or command evidence and producer/consumer/matrix coverage."
   459	
   460	      step_check_pause_sentinel:
   461	        action: "Check for pause sentinel file"
   462	        check: "Does {state_paths.pause_sentinel} exist?"
   463	        if_exists:
   464	          set:
   465	            pending_stop_event: "paused"
   466	            pending_stop_reason: "userPaused"
   467	            pending_stop_detail: "sentinel file detected"
   468	          skip_to: step_normalize_pause_events
   469	        if_not_exists:
   470	          proceed: true
   471	
   472	      step_graph_convergence:
   473	        action: "Evaluate coverage-graph convergence before the inline review convergence vote"
   474	        inspect:
   475	          - "{state_paths.state_log}"
   476	          - "{state_paths.findings_registry}"
   477	        transform: |
   478	          1. Call graph convergence on the current review lineage before the inline 3-signal vote.
   479	          2. Record the decision as one of CONTINUE, STOP_ALLOWED, STOP_BLOCKED.
   480	          3. Preserve raw graph signals and blockers for reducer rollup and blocked-stop evidence.
   481	          4. Normalize blockers to both JSON array and CSV forms for downstream stop handling.
   482	          5. Set graph_stop_blocked = true only when graph_decision == "STOP_BLOCKED".
   483	        bash: 'node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/convergence.cjs --spec-folder "{spec_folder}" --loop-type "review" --session-id "{session_id}"'
   484	        note: "Invoke the runtime script directly. Review-side graph convergence must run before the inline review stop vote."
   485	        append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"graph_convergence","mode":"review","run":{current_iteration},"decision":"{graph_decision}","signals":{graph_signals_json},"blockers":{graph_blockers_json},"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}","sessionId":"{session_id}","generation":{generation}}'
   486	        outputs:
   487	          - graph_decision: "CONTINUE | STOP_ALLOWED | STOP_BLOCKED"
   488	          - graph_signals_json: "JSON object returned by convergence.cjs"
   489	          - graph_blockers_json: "JSON array of graph blockers when present, else []"
   490	          - graph_blockers_csv: "Comma-separated blocker summary when graph blocks STOP, else empty string"
   690	          D) Cancel entirely
   691	        wait_for: "User response"
   692	        on_A: { proceed_to: step_dispatch_iteration }
   693	        on_B: { action: "Update next_dimension to user's choice", proceed_to: step_dispatch_iteration }
   694	        on_C: { proceed_to: gate_pre_synthesis }
   695	        on_D: { action: "Cancel workflow", status: "CANCELLED" }
   696	
   697	      step_dispatch_iteration:
   698	        action: "Dispatch @deep-review agent for one review iteration"
   699	        resolve_executor:
   700	          source: "config.executor"
   701	          loader: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts#parseExecutorConfig"
   702	        pre_dispatch:
   703	          generate_summary: |
   704	            STATE SUMMARY (auto-generated):
   705	            Iteration: {current_iteration} of {max_iterations}
   706	            Dimension: {next_dimension}
   707	            Prior Findings: P0={p0_count} P1={p1_count} P2={p2_count}
   708	            Dimension Coverage: {dimensions_covered_list} ({dimension_coverage})
   709	            Traceability: core={core_protocol_status} overlay={overlay_protocol_status}
   710	            Coverage Age: {coverage_age}
   711	            Last 2 ratios: {ratio_prev} -> {ratio_latest}
   712	            Stuck count: {stuck_count}
   713	            Provisional Verdict: {PASS|CONDITIONAL|FAIL|PENDING} hasAdvisories={has_advisories}
   714	          render_prompt_pack:
   715	            template_path: ".opencode/skills/deep-review/assets/prompt_pack_iteration.md.tmpl"
   716	            renderer: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/prompt-pack.ts#renderPromptPack"
   717	            output_path: "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md"
   718	            variables:
   719	              state_summary: "{state_summary}"
   720	              current_iteration: "{current_iteration}"
   721	              max_iterations: "{max_iterations}"
   722	              next_dimension: "{next_dimension}"
   723	              review_target: "{review_target}"
   724	              review_scope_files: "{review_scope_files}"
   725	              p0_count: "{p0_count}"
   726	              p1_count: "{p1_count}"
   727	              p2_count: "{p2_count}"
   728	              state_paths_config: "{state_paths.config}"
   729	              state_paths_state_log: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   730	              state_paths_findings_registry: "{state_paths.findings_registry}"
   731	              state_paths_strategy: "{state_paths.strategy}"
   732	              state_paths_iteration_pattern: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   733	              state_paths_delta_pattern: "{state_paths.delta_pattern}"
   734	        pre_dispatch_audit:
   735	          skip_when: "config.executor.kind == 'native'"
   736	          call: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts#writeFirstRecordExecutor"
   737	          args:
   738	            stateLogPath: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   739	            executor: "{config.executor}"
   740	            iteration: "{current_iteration}"
   741	        branch_on: "config.executor.kind"
   742	        if_native:
   743	          dispatch:
   744	            agent: deep-review
   745	            model: opus
   746	            context_source: "rendered_prompt_pack"
   747	          wait_for_completion: true
   748	        if_cli_codex:
   749	          command: |
   750	            node --experimental-strip-types --input-type=module <<'EOF'
   751	            import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs';
   752	
   753	            import { runAuditedExecutorCommandAsync } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-audit.ts';
   754	            import { resolveCodexSandboxMode } from './.opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts';
   755	
   756	            const executor = {
   757	              kind: 'cli-codex',
   758	              model: '{config.executor.model}',
   759	              reasoningEffort: '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.reasoningEffort}',
   760	              serviceTier: '{config.executor.serviceTier}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.serviceTier}',
   761	              sandboxMode: '{config.executor.sandboxMode}' === 'null' ? null : '{config.executor.sandboxMode}',
   762	              timeoutSeconds: Number('{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}'),
   763	            };
   764	
   765	            process.exit(await runAuditedExecutorCommandAsync({
   766	              command: 'codex',
   767	              args: [
   768	                'exec',
   769	                '--model',
   770	                executor.model,
   771	                '-c',
   772	                `model_reasoning_effort=${executor.reasoningEffort}`,
   773	                '-c',
   774	                `service_tier=${executor.serviceTier}`,
   775	                '-c',
   776	                'approval_policy=never',
   777	                '--sandbox',
   778	                resolveCodexSandboxMode(executor.sandboxMode),
   779	                '-',
   780	              ],
   781	              cwd: '{repo_root}',
   782	              timeoutSeconds: executor.timeoutSeconds,
   783	              stateLogPath: '{state_paths.state_log}',
   784	              executor,
   785	              iteration: Number('{current_iteration}'),
   786	              input: readFileSync('{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md', 'utf8'),
   787	            }));
   788	            EOF
   789	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   790	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   791	          wait_for_completion: true
   792	        if_cli_copilot:
   793	          command: |
   794	            PROMPT_PATH='{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md'
   795	            PROMPT_SIZE=$(wc -c < "$PROMPT_PATH" | tr -d ' ')
   796	            if [ "$PROMPT_SIZE" -le 16384 ]; then
   797	              copilot \
   798	                -p "$(cat "$PROMPT_PATH")" \
   799	                --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   800	                --allow-all-tools \
   801	                --no-ask-user
   802	            else
   803	              copilot \
   804	                -p "Read the instructions in @$PROMPT_PATH and follow them exactly. Do not deviate." \
   805	                --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   806	                --allow-all-tools \
   807	                --no-ask-user
   808	            fi
   809	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   810	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   811	          wait_for_completion: true
   812	          notes:
   813	            - "copilot has no stdin support; prompt is positional"
   814	            - "Size check uses 16KB threshold; above that uses @PROMPT_PATH wrapper prompt"
   815	            - "Large-prompt path relies on copilot honoring @path references within its prompt string"
   816	        if_cli_gemini:
   817	          command: |
   818	            gemini \
   819	              "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   820	              -m "{config.executor.model}" \
   821	              -s none \
   822	              -y \
   823	              -o text
   824	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   825	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   826	          wait_for_completion: true
   827	          notes:
   828	            - "gemini accepts positional prompt or stdin; we use positional via command substitution"
   829	            - "gemini has no reasoningEffort or serviceTier flags; model is the only lever"
   830	            - "gemini model whitelist enforced at config parse (currently only gemini-3.1-pro-preview)"
   831	        if_cli_claude_code:
   832	          command: |
   833	            claude \
   834	              -p "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   835	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   836	              --permission-mode acceptEdits \
   837	              --output-format text \
   838	              {optional_effort_flag}
   839	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   840	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   841	          wait_for_completion: true
   842	          render_hint:
   843	            optional_effort_flag: |
   844	              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --effort {config.executor.reasoningEffort}
   845	              Otherwise expand to empty string.
   846	          notes:
   847	            - "claude-code default permission-mode is 'plan' (read-only); we override to 'acceptEdits' for iteration writes"
   848	            - "claude-code has no serviceTier flag"
   849	            - "claude-code supports --effort for reasoning depth"
   850	        if_cli_opencode:
   851	          command: |
   852	            opencode run \
   853	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   854	              --agent general \
   855	              --format json \
   856	              --dangerously-skip-permissions \
   857	              --pure \
   858	              --dir "{repo_root}" \
   859	              {optional_variant_flag} \
   860	              "$(cat '{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md')" \
   861	              </dev/null
   862	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   863	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   864	          wait_for_completion: true
   865	          render_hint:
   866	            optional_variant_flag: |
   867	              If config.executor.reasoningEffort is set and non-null, expand to: --variant {config.executor.reasoningEffort}
   868	              Otherwise expand to empty string.
   869	          notes:
   870	            - "opencode run takes a positional message; prompt is fed via command substitution"
   871	            - "--variant maps reasoningEffort to opencode's provider-specific reasoning lever (e.g., high, medium, minimal)"
   872	            - "--dangerously-skip-permissions enables hands-off automation; sandboxMode='read-only' is not currently honored (no opencode equivalent)"
   873	            - "cli-opencode self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-OpenCode dispatch surface (Claude/Codex/Gemini/raw shell). The cli-opencode skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate"
   874	            - "</dev/null required: opencode v1.14.39 reads stdin at startup before session creation. Without explicit closed stdin, automation that redirects stdout/stderr hangs at 0% CPU after `+60s snapshot prune cleanup`. See cli-opencode SKILL.md §4 ALWAYS rule + memory feedback_opencode_run_requires_dev_null_stdin.md."
   875	        if_cli_devin:
   876	          command: |
   877	            devin --print \
   878	              --prompt-file "{state_paths.prompt_dir}/iteration-{current_iteration}.md" \
   879	              --model "{config.executor.model}" \
   880	              --permission-mode "{resolved_permission_mode}" \
   881	              2>&1 </dev/null
   882	          working_directory: "{repo_root}"
   883	          timeout_seconds: "{config.executor.timeoutSeconds}"
   884	          wait_for_completion: true
   885	          render_hint:
   886	            resolved_permission_mode: |
   887	              Resolve via resolveDevinPermissionMode(config.executor.sandboxMode) — defined in
   888	              .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/executor-config.ts.
   889	              Mapping: sandboxMode='danger-full-access' → 'dangerous', everything else → 'auto'.
   890	              Default (sandboxMode unset): 'auto'.
   891	          notes:
   892	            - "devin --prompt-file accepts a path to the rendered iteration prompt (the SKILL.md skill_reference dispatch shape)"
   893	            - "Supported models: swe-1.6 (default), deepseek-v4, glm-5.1, kimi-k2.6 (per DEVIN_SUPPORTED_MODELS in executor-config.ts)"
   894	            - "--permission-mode auto auto-approves read-only ops and prompts on write; dangerous auto-approves all (only for sandboxed runs)"
   895	            - "cli-devin self-invocation guard: this branch must only run from a non-Devin dispatch surface (Claude/Codex/Gemini/OpenCode/raw shell). The cli-devin skill SKILL.md §SELF-INVOCATION PROHIBITED contract is the authoritative gate."
   896	            - "</dev/null required: family convention for non-interactive dispatch to avoid stdin-blocking edge cases across CLI versions"
   897	            - "Cloud handoff is NOT used here — each iteration runs locally with convergence detection. See cli-devin references/cloud_handoff.md for the separate cloud-handoff route."
   898	            - "Reasoning effort is NOT exposed by Devin's CLI surface; reasoning depth is fixed per model (e.g., swe-1.6 vs deepseek-v4). serviceTier is also N/A."
   899	        post_dispatch_validate:
   900	          validator: ".opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/lib/deep-loop/post-dispatch-validate.ts#validateIterationOutputs"
   901	          assert_exists: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   902	          assert_appended: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   903	          assert_jsonl_fields: [type, iteration, mode, run, status, focus, dimensions, filesReviewed, findingsCount, findingsSummary, findingsNew, findingDetails, newFindingsRatio, sessionId, generation, lineageMode, timestamp, durationMs]
   904	          assert_canonical_type: "iteration"
   905	          assert_delta_file_exists: "{state_paths.delta_pattern}"
   906	          assert_delta_file_has_iteration_record: true
   907	          failure_reasons:
   908	            - iteration_file_missing
   909	            - iteration_file_empty
   910	            - jsonl_not_appended
   911	            - jsonl_missing_fields
   912	            - jsonl_parse_error
   913	            - jsonl_wrong_type
   914	            - delta_file_missing
   915	            - delta_file_empty
   916	            - delta_file_missing_iteration_record
   917	            - executor_missing
   918	            - dispatch_failure_logged
   919	            - v2_missing_ledger
   920	            - v2_uncited_ledger_row
   921	            - v2_broken_linked_finding
   922	            - v2_shallow_finding_details
   923	            - delta_iteration_id_mismatch
   924	            - state_delta_iteration_mismatch
   925	          warning_surface:
   926	            source: "result.warnings"
   927	            action: "emit schema_advisory canonical conflict event"
   928	            severity: "advisory"
   929	            event_shape: '{"type":"event","event":"schema_advisory","mode":"review","iteration":{current_iteration},"warnings":{result.warnings},"severity":"advisory","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   930	            note: "Warnings do not fail dispatch. Hard failures still emit schema_mismatch through on_failure."
   931	          on_failure:
   932	            action: "emit schema_mismatch canonical conflict event"
   933	            escalation: "After 3 consecutive failures, trigger stuck_recovery event with diagnostic context"
   934	        record_executor_audit:
   935	          skip_when: "config.executor.kind == 'native'"
   936	          target: "{state_paths.state_log}"
   937	          field: "executor"
   938	          value:
   939	            kind: "{config.executor.kind}"
   940	            model: "{config.executor.model}"
   941	            reasoningEffort: "{config.executor.reasoningEffort}"
   942	            serviceTier: "{config.executor.serviceTier}"
   943	
   944	      step_evaluate_results:
   945	        action: "Verify iteration outputs and extract metrics"
   946	        verify:
   947	          - file_exists: "{state_paths.iteration_pattern}"
   948	          - jsonl_appended: "New iteration record in state.jsonl"
   949	          - strategy_updated: "Strategy.md has been modified"
   950	        extract:
   951	          - newFindingsRatio: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
   952	          - findings_count: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
   953	          - severity_counts: "From latest JSONL iteration record (P0, P1, P2)"
   954	          - dimensions: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
   955	          - files_reviewed: "From latest JSONL iteration record"
  1118	  # PHASE 3: SYNTHESIS
  1119	  # ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  1120	  phase_synthesis:
  1121	    purpose: Compile all iteration findings into review/review-report.md
  1122	    steps:
  1123	
  1124	      step_fanout_merge:
  1125	        description: "Merge N lineage registries with strongest-restriction; bind p0/p1/p2 counts for step_derive_verdict; skip when single-executor"
  1126	        skip_when: "config.fanout is absent"
  1127	        command: |
  1128	          node .opencode/skills/deep-loop-runtime/scripts/fanout-merge.cjs \
  1129	            --loop-type review \
  1130	            --artifact-dir {artifact_dir}
  1131	        working_directory: "{repo_root}"
  1132	        wait_for_completion: true
  1133	        bind_from_output:
  1134	          p0_count: "active_p0"
  1135	          p1_count: "active_p1"
  1136	          p2_count: "active_p2"
  1137	
  1138	      step_hydrate_summary_metrics:

 succeeded in 0ms:
   260	          log: "Auto-resume: state artifacts are complete and consistent. Continue the same lineage (sessionId unchanged, generation unchanged, no archive)."
   261	          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"resumed","mode":"research","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{session_id}","lineageMode":"resume","continuedFromRun":{iteration_count},"generation":{generation},"archivedPath":null,"timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   262	          skip_to: phase_loop
   263	        on_restart:
   264	          action: "Archive the current research packet under the root-level research_archive/ tree and start a new lineage segment with a fresh sessionId and generation+1."
   265	          command: "if [ -d {state_paths.packet_dir} ]; then mkdir -p {state_paths.archive_root} && mv {state_paths.packet_dir} {state_paths.archive_root}/{timestamp_slug}; fi"
   266	          set:
   267	            lineage_mode: "restart"
   268	            parent_session_id: "{prior_session_id}"
   269	            generation: "{prior_generation + 1}"
   270	          append_jsonl: '{"type":"event","event":"restarted","mode":"research","sessionId":"{session_id}","parentSessionId":"{prior_session_id}","lineageMode":"restart","generation":{generation},"archivedPath":"{state_paths.archive_root}/{timestamp_slug}","timestamp":"{ISO_8601_NOW}"}'
   271	          skip_to: step_create_config
   272	        note_deferred_branches: "fork and completed-continue are deferred and no longer runtime-supported in this release. The reducer still reads `lineageMode` from config for dashboards and analysis, but only `new`, `resume`, and `restart` are live. See deep-research/references/protocol/loop_protocol.md §Lifecycle Branch Contract for the one-session contract."
   273	        on_completed_session:
   274	          log: "Prior session already completed. Do not route directly to synthesis; archive the completed research/ tree or start a fresh packet instead."
   275	          halt: true

   280	        on_fresh:

   282

   306	          lineage.continuedFromRun: null

codex
One suspicious thing is surfacing in the research assets: the config template is canonical `executor.kind`, while both research YAMLs still branch on `executor.type`. I’m checking the command surface and tests before classifying it, because this only becomes a P0 if the no-flag default really enters the YAML with `kind` only.

     1	import { afterEach, describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest';

     5	  parseExecutorConfig,

     9	} from '../../lib/deep-loop/executor-config';

    11	describe('executor-config', () => {
    12	  afterEach(() => {
    13	    vi.restoreAllMocks();
    14	  });
    15	
    16	  it('returns all defaults for a native executor config', () => {
    17	    expect(parseExecutorConfig({ kind: 'native' })).toEqual({
    18	      kind: 'native',
    19	      model: null,
    20	      reasoningEffort: null,
    21	      serviceTier: null,
    22	      sandboxMode: null,
    23	      timeoutSeconds: 900,
    24	    });
    25	  });
    26	
    27	  it('defaults to native when given an empty object', () => {
    28	    expect(parseExecutorConfig({})).toMatchObject({
    29	      kind: 'native',
    30	      timeoutSeconds: 900,
    31	    });
    32	  });
    33	
    34	  it('accepts a wired cli-codex executor with a model', () => {
    35	    expect(parseExecutorConfig({ kind: 'cli-codex', model: 'gpt-5.4' })).toMatchObject({
    36	      kind: 'cli-codex',
    37	      model: 'gpt-5.4',
    38	    });
    39	  });
    40	
    41	  it('accepts deprecated executor type as an alias for kind and logs a warning', () => {
    42	    const warn = vi.spyOn(console, 'warn').mockImplementation(() => undefined);
    43	
    44	    expect(parseExecutorConfig({ type: 'cli-codex', model: 'gpt-5.4' })).toMatchObject({
    45	      kind: 'cli-codex',
    46	      model: 'gpt-5.4',
    47	    });
    48	    expect(warn).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.stringContaining("Deprecated executor field 'type'"));
    49	  });
    50	
    51	  it('rejects conflicting deprecated type and canonical kind values', () => {
    52	    expect(() => parseExecutorConfig({ type: 'native', kind: 'cli-codex', model: 'gpt-5.4' })).toThrow(
    53	      ExecutorConfigError,
    54	    );
    55	  });
    56	
    57	  it('rejects cli-codex when model is null', () => {
    58	    try {
    59	      parseExecutorConfig({ kind: 'cli-codex', model: null });
    60	      throw new Error('Expected parseExecutorConfig to throw');
    61	    } catch (error: unknown) {
    62	      expect(error).toBeInstanceOf(ExecutorConfigError);
    63	      if (error instanceof ExecutorConfigError) {
    64	        expect(error.issues).toContainEqual({
    65	          path: ['model'],
    66	          message: 'model is required when kind is cli-codex',
    67	        });
    68	      }
    69	    }
    70	  });
    71	
    72	
    73	  it('accepts a cli-gemini executor with a supported model', () => {

    75	      kind: 'cli-gemini',
    76	      model: 'gemini-3.1-pro-preview',
    77	    });
    78	  });
    79	
    80	  it('accepts a cli-claude-code executor with a model', () => {

    82	      kind: 'cli-claude-code',
    83	      model: 'claude-opus-4-6',
    84	    });
    85	  });
    86	
    87	  it('accepts cli-claude-code reasoningEffort because the kind supports it', () => {

    89	      parseExecutorConfig({ kind: 'cli-claude-code', model: 'claude-opus-4-6', reasoningEffort: 'high' }),

    92	      model: 'claude-opus-4-6',

    97	  it('rejects unknown executor kinds', () => {
    98	    expect(() => parseExecutorConfig({ kind: 'mystery-cli', model: 'x' })).toThrow(ExecutorConfigError);

   100

    11	function makeTempDir(prefix: string): string {

    17	/**

     1	#!/usr/bin/env node
     2	
     3	// ╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
     4	// ║ Deep-Loop Runtime — Fan-Out CLI Lineage Pool Runner                      ║
     5	// ╠══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣
     6	// ║ Input:  CLI args (--spec-folder, --loop-type, --fanout-config-json,      ║
     7	// ║         --base-artifact-dir).                                            ║
     8	// ║ Output: JSON to stdout.                                                  ║
     9	// ║ Exit:   0=all ok, 1=script error, 2=some failed, 3=all failed.          ║
    10	// ╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
    11	
    12	'use strict';
    13	
    14	// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    15	// 1. IMPORTS
    16	// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    17	
    18	const fs = require('node:fs');
    19	const os = require('node:os');
    20	const path = require('node:path');
    21	const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process');
    22	
    23	const {
    24	  classifyExitCode,
    25	  installSignalHandlers,
    26	  maybeThrowTestFault,
    27	  validateNamespaceValue,
    28	} = require('./lib/cli-guards.cjs');
    29	
    30	const {
    31	  runCappedPool,
    32	  appendStatusLedger,
    33	  writeOrchestrationSummary,
    34	} = require('./fanout-pool.cjs');
    35	
    36	// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    37	// 2. TSX BOOTSTRAP
    38	// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    39	
    40	const TSX_LOADER = path.resolve(
    41	  __dirname,
    42	  '..',
    43	  '..',
    44	  'system-spec-kit',
    45	  'scripts',
    46	  'node_modules',
    47	  'tsx',
    48	  'dist',
    49	  'loader.mjs',
    50	);
    51	
    52	if (process.env.DEEP_LOOP_TSX_LOADED !== '1') {
    53	  const child = spawnSync(
    54	    process.execPath,
    55	    ['--import', TSX_LOADER, __filename, ...process.argv.slice(2)],
    56	    {
    57	      cwd: process.cwd(),
    58	      env: { ...process.env, DEEP_LOOP_TSX_LOADED: '1' },
    59	      input: process.stdin.isTTY ? undefined : fs.readFileSync(0),
    60	      encoding: 'utf8',
    61	    },
    62	  );
    63	  if (child.stdout) process.stdout.write(child.stdout);
    64	  if (child.stderr) process.stderr.write(child.stderr);
    65	  process.exit(child.status === null ? 1 : child.status);
    66	}
    67	
    68	// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    69	// 3. HELPERS
    70	// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    71	
    72	function parseArgs(argv = process.argv.slice(2)) {
    73	  const args = {};
    74	  for (let i = 0; i < argv.length; i += 1) {
    75	    const token = argv[i];
    76	    if (!token.startsWith('--')) {
    77	      throw inputError(`Unexpected positional argument: ${token}`);
    78	    }
    79	    const key = token.slice(2).replace(/-([a-z])/g, (_, c) => c.toUpperCase());
    80	    const next = argv[i + 1];
    81	    if (next === undefined || next.startsWith('--')) {
    82	      args[key] = true;
    83	    } else {
    84	      args[key] = next;
    85	      i += 1;
    86	    }
    87	  }
    88	  return args;
    89	}
    90	
    91	function inputError(message) {
    92	  const err = new Error(message);
    93	  err.code = 'INPUT_VALIDATION';
    94	  return err;
    95	}
    96	
    97	function ensureString(args, key) {
    98	  if (!args[key] || typeof args[key] !== 'string') {
    99	    throw inputError(`${key} is required`);
   100	  }
   101	  return args[key];
   102	}
   103	
   104	function jsonOut(payload) {
   105	  process.stdout.write(`${JSON.stringify(payload)}\n`);
   106	}
   107	
   108	// Per-kind first state-dir env var (used for lockfile isolation across same-kind replicas).
   109	const SPECKIT_STATE_ENV_BY_KIND = {
   110	  'cli-codex': 'SPECKIT_CODEX_STATE_DIR',
   111	  'cli-gemini': 'SPECKIT_GEMINI_STATE_DIR',
   112	  'cli-claude-code': 'SPECKIT_CLAUDE_CODE_STATE_DIR',
   113	  'cli-opencode': 'SPECKIT_OPENCODE_STATE_DIR',
   114	  'cli-devin': 'SPECKIT_DEVIN_STATE_DIR',
   115	};
   116	
   117	/**
   118	 * Build the "run the full loop" prompt text for a CLI lineage subprocess.
   119	 * The subprocess reads this, loads the skill, and runs the loop to convergence
   120	 * with config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir overriding step_resolve_artifact_root.
   121	 */
   122	function buildLoopPrompt(loopType, specFolder, lineageDir, sessionId, lineage) {
   123	  const skillFile =
   124	    loopType === 'review'
   125	      ? '.opencode/skills/deep-review/SKILL.md'
   126	      : '.opencode/skills/deep-research/SKILL.md';
   127	  const agentName = loopType === 'review' ? 'deep-review' : 'deep-research';
   128	  return [
   129	    `You are a ${agentName} agent running a fan-out lineage.`,
   130	    ``,
   131	    `Read ${skillFile} and execute the ${loopType} loop with these parameters:`,
   132	    `  spec_folder: ${specFolder}`,
   133	    `  config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir: ${lineageDir}`,
   134	    `  session_id: ${sessionId}`,
   135	    `  executor: ${lineage.kind} model=${lineage.model || 'default'}`,
   136	    `  loop_type: ${loopType}`,
   137	    ``,
   138	    `The step_resolve_artifact_root step will bind artifact_dir to ${lineageDir} via the`,
   139	    `config.fanout_lineage_artifact_dir override — do NOT run the resolveArtifactRoot node`,
   140	    `command; bind artifact_dir directly to the override value.`,
   141	    ``,
   142	    `Run phase_init, phase_main_loop (to convergence), and phase_synthesis.`,
   143	    `Write all outputs to ${lineageDir}. Do not touch any path outside ${lineageDir}.`,
   144	    ``,
   145	    `When complete, output a single line: FANOUT_LINEAGE_COMPLETE:${lineage.label}`,
   146	  ].join('\n');
   147	}
   148	
   149	/**
   150	 * Compute a generous timeout for a full lineage loop run.
   151	 * A single iteration is timeoutSeconds; a full loop is up to iterations * timeoutSeconds.
   152	 * We double it for safety and cap at 4 hours.
   153	 */
   154	function computeLineageTimeoutMs(lineage) {
   155	  const iters = lineage.iterations || 12;
   156	  const perIterSecs = lineage.timeoutSeconds || 900;
   157	  return Math.min(iters * perIterSecs * 2 * 1000, 4 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
   158	}
   159	
   160	/**
   161	 * Build the subprocess command for a CLI lineage.
   162	 * Returns { command, args, input?, env } where input is stdin content when applicable.
   163	 */
   164	function buildLineageCommand(lineage, prompt, resolvedSandbox, resolvedPermission) {
   165	  const kind = lineage.kind;
   166	
   167	  if (kind === 'cli-codex') {
   168	    return {
   169	      command: 'codex',
   170	      args: [
   171	        'exec',
   172	        '--model',
   173	        lineage.model || 'o4-mini',
   174	        '-c',
   175	        `model_reasoning_effort=${lineage.reasoningEffort || 'medium'}`,
   176	        '-c',
   177	        `service_tier=${lineage.serviceTier || 'default'}`,
   178	        '-c',
   179	        'approval_policy=never',
   180	        '--sandbox',
   181	        resolvedSandbox,
   182	        '-',
   183	      ],
   184	      input: prompt,
   185	    };
   186	  }
   187
